Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * Functors

Authors: Benedikt Ahrens, Chris Kapulkin, Mike Shulman (January 2013)

*)

(** ** Contents:

  - preserve isos, inverses
  - Conservative functors ([conservative])
  - Composition of functors, identity functors
  - fully faithful functors
    - preserve isos, inverses, composition backwards
  - (Split) essentially surjective functors
  - faithful
  - full
  - fully faithful is the same as full and faithful
  - Image of a functor, full subcat specified by a functor


*)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Propositions.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Sets.

Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.PartA.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.TransportMorphisms.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.

Local Open Scope cat.

(** * Functors : Morphisms of precategories *)
Section functors.

Definition functor_data (C C' : precategory_ob_mor) : UU :=
  total2 ( fun F : ob C -> ob C' =>  ∏ a b : ob C, a --> b -> F a --> F b).

Definition make_functor_data {C C' : precategory_ob_mor} (F : ob C -> ob C')
           (H : ∏ a b : ob C, a --> b -> F a --> F b) : functor_data C C' := tpair _ F H.


C, C': precategory_ob_mor
hs: has_homsets C'
hsC': isaset C'
isaset (functor_data C C')


C, C': precategory_ob_mor
hs: has_homsets C'
hsC': isaset C'
isaset (functor_data C C')

  
C, C': precategory_ob_mor
hs: has_homsets C'
hsC': isaset C'
isofhlevel 2 (functor_data C C')

  
C, C': precategory_ob_mor
hs: has_homsets C'
hsC': isaset C'
isofhlevel 2 (C → C')
C, C': precategory_ob_mor
hs: has_homsets C'
hsC': isaset C'
∏ x : C → C',
isofhlevel 2 (∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C' ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)

  
C, C': precategory_ob_mor
hs: has_homsets C'
hsC': isaset C'
t: C
isofhlevel 2 C'
C, C': precategory_ob_mor
hs: has_homsets C'
hsC': isaset C'
∏ x : C → C',
isofhlevel 2 (∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C' ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)

  
C, C': precategory_ob_mor
hs: has_homsets C'
hsC': isaset C'
∏ x : C → C',
isofhlevel 2 (∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C' ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)

  
C, C': precategory_ob_mor
hs: has_homsets C'
hsC': isaset C'
x: C → C'
isofhlevel 2 (∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C' ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)

  
C, C': precategory_ob_mor
hs: has_homsets C'
hsC': isaset C'
x: C → C'
t, t0: C
t1: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
isofhlevel 2 (C' ⟦ x t, x t0 ⟧)

  apply hs.
Qed.

Definition functor_data_constr (C C' : precategory_ob_mor)
           (F : ob C -> ob C') (Fm : ∏ a b : ob C, a --> b -> F a --> F b) :
  functor_data C C' := tpair _ F Fm .

Definition functor_on_objects {C C' : precategory_ob_mor}
     (F : functor_data C C') :  ob C -> ob C' := pr1 F.
Coercion functor_on_objects : functor_data >-> Funclass.

Definition functor_on_morphisms {C C' : precategory_ob_mor} (F : functor_data C C')
  { a b : ob C} :  a --> b -> F a --> F b := pr2 F a b.

Notation "# F" := (functor_on_morphisms F) (at level 3) : cat.

Definition functor_idax {C C' : precategory_data} (F : functor_data C C') :=
  ∏ a : ob C, #F (identity a) = identity (F a).

Definition functor_compax {C C' : precategory_data} (F : functor_data C C') :=
  ∏ a b c : ob C, ∏ f : a --> b, ∏ g : b --> c, #F (f · g) = #F f · #F g .

Definition is_functor {C C' : precategory_data} (F : functor_data C C') :=
  ( functor_idax F ) × ( functor_compax F ) .

Definition make_is_functor {C C' : precategory_data} {F : functor_data C C'}
  (H1 : functor_idax F)
  (H2 : functor_compax F)
  : is_functor F
  := make_dirprod H1 H2.


C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
F: functor_data C C'
isaprop (is_functor F)


C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
F: functor_data C C'
isaprop (is_functor F)

  
C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
F: functor_data C C'
isofhlevel 1 (functor_idax F)
C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
F: functor_data C C'
isofhlevel 1 (functor_compax F)

  
C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
F: functor_data C C'
t: C
isofhlevel 1 (# F (identity t) = identity (F t))
C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
F: functor_data C C'
isofhlevel 1 (functor_compax F)

  
C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
F: functor_data C C'
isofhlevel 1 (functor_compax F)

  
C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
F: functor_data C C'
t, t0, t1: C
t2: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t3: C ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
isofhlevel 1 (# F (t2 · t3) = # F t2 · # F t3)

  apply hs.
Qed.

Definition functor (C C' : precategory_data) : UU :=
  total2 ( λ F : functor_data C C', is_functor F ).

Notation "a ⟶ b" := (functor a b) : cat.
(* to input: type "\-->" with Agda input method *)



C, C': precategory_data
F: functor_data C C'
H: is_functor F
C ⟶ C'


C, C': precategory_data
F: functor_data C C'
H: is_functor F
C ⟶ C'


C, C': precategory_data
F: functor_data C C'
H: is_functor F
is_functor F

exact H.
Defined.


C, C': precategory_ob_mor
F, F': functor_data C C'
H: ∏ c : C, F c = F' c
H1: ∏ (C1 C2 : C) (f : C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (H C1) (H C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f
transportf
  (λ x : C → C',
   ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C' ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
  (funextfun F F' (λ c : C, H c)) (pr2 F) = pr2 F'


C, C': precategory_ob_mor
F, F': functor_data C C'
H: ∏ c : C, F c = F' c
H1: ∏ (C1 C2 : C) (f : C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (H C1) (H C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f
transportf
  (λ x : C → C',
   ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C' ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
  (funextfun F F' (λ c : C, H c)) (pr2 F) = pr2 F'


C, C': precategory_ob_mor
F, F': functor_data C C'
H: ∏ c : C, F c = F' c
H1: ∏ (C1 C2 : C) (f : C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (H C1) (H C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f
homotsec
  (transportf
     (λ x : C → C',
      ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C' ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
     (funextfun F F' (λ c : C, H c)) (pr2 F)) (pr2 F')
 
C, C': precategory_ob_mor
F, F': functor_data C C'
H: ∏ c : C, F c = F' c
H1: ∏ (C1 C2 : C) (f : C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (H C1) (H C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f
C1: C
transportf
  (λ x : C → C',
   ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C' ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
  (funextfun F F' (λ c : C, H c)) (pr2 F) C1 =
pr2 F' C1

F, F': functor_data C C'
H: ∏ c : C, F c = F' c
H1: ∏ (C1 C2 : C) (f : C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (H C1) (H C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f
C1: C
homotsec
  (transportf
     (λ x : C → C',
      ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C' ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
     (funextfun F F' (λ c : C, H c)) (pr2 F) C1)
  (pr2 F' C1)

double_transport (H C1) (H C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f
C1, C2: C
transportf
  (λ x : C → C',
   ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C' ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
  (funextfun F F' (λ c : C, H c)) (pr2 F) C1 C2 =
pr2 F' C1 C2
 
C, C': precategory_ob_mor
F, F': functor_data C C'
H: ∏ c : C, F c = F' c
H1: ∏ (C1 C2 : C) (f : C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (H C1) (H C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f
C1, C2: C
homotsec
  (transportf
     (λ x : C → C',
      ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C' ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
     (funextfun F F' (λ c : C, H c)) (pr2 F) C1 C2)

C, C': precategory_ob_mor
F, F': functor_data C C'
H: ∏ c : C, F c = F' c
H1: ∏ (C1 C2 : C) (f : C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (H C1) (H C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f
C1, C2: C
f: C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : C → C',
   ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C' ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
  (funextfun F F' (λ c : C, H c)) (pr2 F) C1 C2 f =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f


C, C': precategory_ob_mor
F, F': functor_data C C'
H: ∏ c : C, F c = F' c
H1: ∏ (C1 C2 : C) (f : C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (H C1) (H C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f
C1, C2: C
f: C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : C → C',
   ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C' ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
  (funextfun F F' (λ c : C, H c)) (pr2 F) C1 C2 f =
transportf (λ x : C → C', C' ⟦ x C1, x C2 ⟧)
  (funextfun F F' (λ c : C, H c)) (pr2 F C1 C2 f)
C, C': precategory_ob_mor
F, F': functor_data C C'
H: ∏ c : C, F c = F' c
H1: ∏ (C1 C2 : C) (f : C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (H C1) (H C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f
C1, C2: C
f: C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
e: transportf
  (λ x : C → C',
   ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C' ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
  (funextfun F F' (λ c : C, H c)) (pr2 F) C1 C2 f =
transportf (λ x : C → C', C' ⟦ x C1, x C2 ⟧)
  (funextfun F F' (λ c : C, H c)) (pr2 F C1 C2 f)
transportf
  (λ x : C → C',
   ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C' ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
  (funextfun F F' (λ c : C, H c)) (pr2 F) C1 C2 f =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f


C, C': precategory_ob_mor
F, F': functor_data C C'
H: ∏ c : C, F c = F' c
H1: ∏ (C1 C2 : C) (f : C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (H C1) (H C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f
C1, C2: C
f: C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : C → C',
   ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C' ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
  (funextfun F F' (λ c : C, H c)) (pr2 F) C1 C2 f =
transportf (λ x : C → C', C' ⟦ x C1, x C2 ⟧)
  (funextfun F F' (λ c : C, H c)) (pr2 F C1 C2 f)
 now induction (funextfun F F' (λ c, H c)). 
C, C': precategory_ob_mor
F, F': functor_data C C'
H: ∏ c : C, F c = F' c
H1: ∏ (C1 C2 : C) (f : C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (H C1) (H C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f
C1, C2: C
f: C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
e: transportf
  (λ x : C → C',
   ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C' ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
  (funextfun F F' (λ c : C, H c)) (pr2 F) C1 C2 f =
transportf (λ x : C → C', C' ⟦ x C1, x C2 ⟧)
  (funextfun F F' (λ c : C, H c)) (pr2 F C1 C2 f)
transportf
  (λ x : C → C',
   ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C' ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
  (funextfun F F' (λ c : C, H c)) (pr2 F) C1 C2 f =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f


C, C': precategory_ob_mor
F, F': functor_data C C'
H: ∏ c : C, F c = F' c
H1: ∏ (C1 C2 : C) (f : C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (H C1) (H C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f
C1, C2: C
f: C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧
e: transportf
  (λ x : C → C',
   ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C' ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
  (funextfun F F' (λ c : C, H c)) (pr2 F) C1 C2 f =
transportf (λ x : C → C', C' ⟦ x C1, x C2 ⟧)
  (funextfun F F' (λ c : C, H c)) (pr2 F C1 C2 f)
transportf (λ x0 : C', C' ⟦ F' C1, x0 ⟧) (H C2)
  (transportf (λ x0 : C', C' ⟦ x0, F C2 ⟧) (H C1)
     (pr2 F C1 C2 f)) = pr2 F' C1 C2 f

exact (H1 C1 C2 f).
Qed.


C, C': precategory_ob_mor
F, F': functor_data C C'
H: homotsec F F'
H1: ∏ (C1 C2 : C) (f : C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (H C1) (H C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f
F = F'


C, C': precategory_ob_mor
F, F': functor_data C C'
H: homotsec F F'
H1: ∏ (C1 C2 : C) (f : C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (H C1) (H C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f
F = F'


C, C': precategory_ob_mor
F, F': functor_data C C'
H: homotsec F F'
H1: ∏ (C1 C2 : C) (f : C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (H C1) (H C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f
pr1 F = pr1 F'
C, C': precategory_ob_mor
F, F': functor_data C C'
H: homotsec F F'
H1: ∏ (C1 C2 : C) (f : C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (H C1) (H C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f
transportf
  (λ x : C → C',
   ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C' ⟦ x a, x b ⟧) ?p (pr2 F) =
pr2 F'


C, C': precategory_ob_mor
F, F': functor_data C C'
H: homotsec F F'
H1: ∏ (C1 C2 : C) (f : C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (H C1) (H C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f
pr1 F = pr1 F'
 
C, C': precategory_ob_mor
F, F': functor_data C C'
H: homotsec F F'
H1: ∏ (C1 C2 : C) (f : C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (H C1) (H C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f
homotsec (pr1 F) (pr1 F')
 
C, C': precategory_ob_mor
F, F': functor_data C C'
H: homotsec F F'
H1: ∏ (C1 C2 : C) (f : C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (H C1) (H C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f
c: C
pr1 F c = pr1 F' c
 exact (H c).

C, C': precategory_ob_mor
F, F': functor_data C C'
H: homotsec F F'
H1: ∏ (C1 C2 : C) (f : C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (H C1) (H C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f
transportf
  (λ x : C → C',
   ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C' ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
  (funextfun (pr1 F) (pr1 F')
     ((λ c : C, H c) : homotsec (pr1 F) (pr1 F')))
  (pr2 F) = pr2 F'
 now apply functor_data_eq_prf.
Defined.

hs: has_homsets C'
F, F': C ⟶ C'
pr1 F = pr1 F' → F = F'


C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
F, F': C ⟶ C'
pr1 F = pr1 F' → F = F'

hs: has_homsets C'
F, F': C ⟶ C'
H: pr1 F = pr1 F'
F = F'

  
C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
F, F': C ⟶ C'
H: pr1 F = pr1 F'
transportf is_functor H (pr2 F) = pr2 F'

  
C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
F, F': C ⟶ C'
H: pr1 F = pr1 F'
isaprop (is_functor (pr1 F'))

  
C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
F, F': C ⟶ C'
H: pr1 F = pr1 F'
has_homsets C'

  apply hs.
Defined.

hs: has_homsets C'
hsC': isaset C'
isaset (C ⟶ C')

hs: has_homsets C'

isaset (C ⟶ C')

hs: has_homsets C'
hsC': isaset C'
isofhlevel 2 (functor_data C C')
C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
hsC': isaset C'
∏ x : functor_data C C', isofhlevel 2 (is_functor x)

  
C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
hsC': isaset C'
∏ x : functor_data C C', isofhlevel 2 (is_functor x)

  
C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
hsC': isaset C'
x: functor_data C C'
isofhlevel 2 (is_functor x)

  
C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
hsC': isaset C'
x: functor_data C C'
isaprop (is_functor x)

  apply (isaprop_is_functor C C' hs).
Qed.

Definition functor_data_from_functor (C C': precategory_data)
     (F : functor C C') : functor_data C C' := pr1 F.
Coercion functor_data_from_functor : functor >-> functor_data.



C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
p, q: F = G
H: base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G p) =
base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G q)
p = q


C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
p, q: F = G
H: base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G p) =
base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G q)
p = q

  
C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
p, q: F = G
H: base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G p) =
base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G q)
base_paths F G p,, fiber_paths p =
base_paths F G q,, fiber_paths q

  
C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
p, q: F = G
H: base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G p) =
base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G q)
base_paths F G p = base_paths F G q
C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
p, q: F = G
H: base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G p) =
base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G q)
H': base_paths F G p = base_paths F G q
base_paths F G p,, fiber_paths p =
base_paths F G q,, fiber_paths q

  
C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
p, q: F = G
H: base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G p) =
base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G q)
base_paths F G p = base_paths F G q
 
C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
p, q: F = G
H: base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G p) =
base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G q)
base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G p),,
fiber_paths (base_paths F G p) =
base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G q),,
fiber_paths (base_paths F G q)

    
C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
p, q: F = G
H: base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G p) =
base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G q)
isaset
  (∏ a b : C,
   C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C' ⟦ pr1 (pr1 G) a, pr1 (pr1 G) b ⟧)

    
C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
p, q: F = G
H: base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G p) =
base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G q)
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
isaset (C' ⟦ pr1 (pr1 G) a, pr1 (pr1 G) b ⟧)

    apply hs.
  
C, C': precategory_data
hs: has_homsets C'
F, G: C ⟶ C'
p, q: F = G
H: base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G p) =
base_paths (pr1 F) (pr1 G) (base_paths F G q)
H': base_paths F G p = base_paths F G q
base_paths F G p,, fiber_paths p =
base_paths F G q,, fiber_paths q

  apply (two_arg_paths_f H'), uip, isasetaprop, isaprop_is_functor, hs.
Defined.

Definition functor_id {C C' : precategory_data}(F : functor C C'):
       ∏ a : ob C, #F (identity a) = identity (F a) := pr1 (pr2 F).


Definition functor_comp {C C' : precategory_data}
           (F : functor C C') {a b c : C} (f : a --> b) (g : b --> c)
  : #F (f · g) = #F f · #F g
  := pr2 (pr2 F) _ _ _ _ _ .



A, B: precategory
G: A ⟶ B
a: A
f: A ⟦ a, a ⟧
f = identity a → # G f = identity (G a)


A, B: precategory
G: A ⟶ B
a: A
f: A ⟦ a, a ⟧
f = identity a → # G f = identity (G a)

  
A, B: precategory
G: A ⟶ B
a: A
f: A ⟦ a, a ⟧
e: f = identity a
# G f = identity (G a)

  
A, B: precategory
G: A ⟶ B
a: A
f: A ⟦ a, a ⟧
e: f = identity a
# G f = # G (identity a)
A, B: precategory
G: A ⟶ B
a: A
f: A ⟦ a, a ⟧
e: f = identity a
# G (identity a) = identity (G a)

  
A, B: precategory
G: A ⟶ B
a: A
f: A ⟦ a, a ⟧
e: f = identity a
# G f = # G (identity a)
 
A, B: precategory
G: A ⟶ B
a: A
f: A ⟦ a, a ⟧
e: f = identity a
f = identity a
 apply e.
  
A, B: precategory
G: A ⟶ B
a: A
f: A ⟦ a, a ⟧
e: f = identity a
# G (identity a) = identity (G a)
 apply functor_id.
Defined.


A, B: precategory
G: A ⟶ B
a, a': A
f: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
g: A ⟦ a', a ⟧
f · g = identity a → # G f · # G g = identity (G a)


A, B: precategory
G: A ⟶ B
a, a': A
f: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
g: A ⟦ a', a ⟧
f · g = identity a → # G f · # G g = identity (G a)

  
A, B: precategory
G: A ⟶ B
a, a': A
f: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
g: A ⟦ a', a ⟧
e: f · g = identity a
# G f · # G g = identity (G a)

  
A, B: precategory
G: A ⟶ B
a, a': A
f: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
g: A ⟦ a', a ⟧
e: f · g = identity a
# G f · # G g = # G (identity a)
A, B: precategory
G: A ⟶ B
a, a': A
f: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
g: A ⟦ a', a ⟧
e: f · g = identity a
# G (identity a) = identity (G a)

  
A, B: precategory
G: A ⟶ B
a, a': A
f: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
g: A ⟦ a', a ⟧
e: f · g = identity a
# G f · # G g = # G (identity a)
 
A, B: precategory
G: A ⟶ B
a, a': A
f: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
g: A ⟦ a', a ⟧
e: f · g = identity a
# G f · # G g = # G (f · g)
 apply (! functor_comp _ _ _).
  
A, B: precategory
G: A ⟶ B
a, a': A
f: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
g: A ⟦ a', a ⟧
e: f · g = identity a
# G (identity a) = identity (G a)
 
A, B: precategory
G: A ⟶ B
a, a': A
f: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
g: A ⟦ a', a ⟧
e: f · g = identity a
identity a = identity a

    apply idpath.
Qed.



(** ** Functors preserve isomorphisms *)



C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: iso a b
is_inverse_in_precat (# F f) (# F (inv_from_iso f))


C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: iso a b
is_inverse_in_precat (# F f) (# F (inv_from_iso f))

  
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: iso a b
# F f · # F (inv_from_iso f) = identity (F a)
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: iso a b
# F (inv_from_iso f) · # F f = identity (F b)

  
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: iso a b
# F (f · inv_from_iso f) = identity (F a)
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: iso a b
# F (inv_from_iso f) · # F f = identity (F b)

  
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: iso a b
# F (identity a) = identity (F a)
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: iso a b
# F (inv_from_iso f) · # F f = identity (F b)

  
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: iso a b
# F (inv_from_iso f) · # F f = identity (F b)


  
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: iso a b
# F (inv_from_iso f · f) = identity (F b)

  
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: iso a b
# F (identity b) = identity (F b)

  apply functor_id.
Qed.


C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: is_iso f
is_iso (# F f)


C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: is_iso f
is_iso (# F f)

a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: is_iso f
is_inverse_in_precat (# F f)
  (# F (inv_from_iso (make_iso f H)))

  apply (is_inverse_functor_image _ _ _ _ _ (make_iso _ H)).
Qed.

F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: iso a b
is_iso (# F f)

f: iso a b
iso (F a) (F b)

a, b: C
f: iso a b

  apply functor_on_iso_is_iso.
Defined.


C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: iso a b
functor_on_iso F (iso_inv_from_iso f) =
iso_inv_from_iso (functor_on_iso F f)


C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: iso a b
functor_on_iso F (iso_inv_from_iso f) =
iso_inv_from_iso (functor_on_iso F f)

F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: iso a b
# F (inv_from_iso f) =
inv_from_iso (functor_on_iso F f)

  
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: iso a b
precomp_with (# F f) (# F (inv_from_iso f)) =
identity (F a)

  
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: iso a b
# F f · # F (inv_from_iso f) = identity (F a)

# F (f · inv_from_iso f) = identity (F a)

  apply functor_id.
Defined.

a, b: C

H: is_iso f
inv_from_iso
  (make_iso (# F f) (functor_on_is_iso_is_iso F H)) =
# F (inv_from_iso (make_iso f H))

  (make_iso (# F f) (functor_on_is_iso_is_iso F H)) =
# F (inv_from_iso (make_iso f H))

f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: is_iso f
# F (inv_from_iso (make_iso f H)) =
inv_from_iso
  (make_iso (# F f) (functor_on_is_iso_is_iso F H))

F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: is_iso f
precomp_with
  (make_iso (# F f) (functor_on_is_iso_is_iso F H))
  (# F (inv_from_iso (make_iso f H))) = identity (F a)
 
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: is_iso f
precomp_with (# F f)
  (# F (inv_from_iso (make_iso f H))) = identity (F a)
 
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: is_iso f
# F f · # F (inv_from_iso (make_iso f H)) =
identity (F a)

  
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: is_iso f
# F (f · inv_from_iso (make_iso f H)) = identity (F a)
 
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: is_iso f
tmp:= iso_inv_after_iso (make_iso f H): make_iso f H · inv_from_iso (make_iso f H) = identity a
# F (f · inv_from_iso (make_iso f H)) = identity (F a)
 
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: is_iso f
tmp:= iso_inv_after_iso (make_iso f H): f · inv_from_iso (make_iso f H) = identity a
# F (f · inv_from_iso (make_iso f H)) = identity (F a)

  
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: is_iso f
tmp:= iso_inv_after_iso (make_iso f H): f · inv_from_iso (make_iso f H) = identity a
# F (identity a) = identity (F a)
 apply functor_id.
Qed.



Section functors_on_iso_with_inv.

  
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
H: is_inverse_in_precat f g
is_inverse_in_precat (# F f) (# F g)

F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, a ⟧

is_inverse_in_precat (# F f) (# F g)

a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
H: is_inverse_in_precat f g
# F f · # F g = identity (F a)

a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
H: is_inverse_in_precat f g
# F g · # F f = identity (F b)

    
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
H: is_inverse_in_precat f g
# F f · # F g = identity (F a)

a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
H: is_inverse_in_precat f g
# F (f · g) = identity (F a)

g: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
H: is_inverse_in_precat f g
# F (identity a) = identity (F a)
 apply functor_id.
    
C, C': precategory

g: C ⟦ b, a ⟧

# F g · # F f = identity (F b)

g: C ⟦ b, a ⟧
H: is_inverse_in_precat f g
# F (identity b) = identity (F b)
 apply functor_id.
  Qed.

F: C ⟶ C'

 exact (# F (is_z_isomorphism_mor I)).

 exact (functor_on_is_inverse_in_precat F I).
  Defined.

  
C, D: precategory
c, c': C
F: C ⟶ D
f: iso c c'
is_inverse_in_precat (# F f) (# F (inv_from_iso f))

F: C ⟶ D
f: iso c c'
is_inverse_in_precat (# F f) (# F (inv_from_iso f))

F: C ⟶ D

is_inverse_in_precat f (inv_from_iso f)

F: C ⟶ D
f: iso c c'
f · inv_from_iso f = identity c

c, c': C
F: C ⟶ D
f: iso c c'
inv_from_iso f · f = identity c'

c, c': C
F: C ⟶ D
f: iso c c'
f · inv_from_iso f = identity c

c, c': C
F: C ⟶ D
f: iso c c'
is_inverse_in_precat f (inv_from_iso f)

c, c': C

f: iso c c'
f · inv_from_iso f = identity c

c, c': C
F: C ⟶ D
f: iso c c'
inv_from_iso f · f = identity c'

c, c': C
F: C ⟶ D
f: iso c c'
f · inv_from_iso f = identity c
 apply (iso_inv_after_iso f).

F: C ⟶ D
f: iso c c'
inv_from_iso f · f = identity c'
 apply (iso_after_iso_inv f).

F: C ⟶ D
f: iso c c'
inv_from_iso f · f = identity c'

F: C ⟶ D
f: iso c c'
is_inverse_in_precat f (inv_from_iso f)

c, c': C

f: iso c c'
f · inv_from_iso f = identity c

f: iso c c'
inv_from_iso f · f = identity c'

      
C, D: precategory
c, c': C
F: C ⟶ D
f: iso c c'
f · inv_from_iso f = identity c
 apply (iso_inv_after_iso f).
      
C, D: precategory
c, c': C
F: C ⟶ D
f: iso c c'
inv_from_iso f · f = identity c'
 apply (iso_after_iso_inv f).
  Qed.

is_inverse_in_precat (# F f) (# F (inv_from_z_iso f))

F: C ⟶ D
f: z_iso c c'
f · inv_from_z_iso f = identity c
 apply z_iso_inv_after_z_iso.

c, c': C
F: C ⟶ D
f: z_iso c c'
inv_from_z_iso f · f = identity c'
 apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv.
  Qed.

  
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: z_iso a b
z_iso (F a) (F b)

  
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: z_iso a b
z_iso (F a) (F b)

F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: z_iso a b
C' ⟦ F a, F b ⟧

F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: z_iso a b
C' ⟦ F b, F a ⟧

F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: z_iso a b
is_inverse_in_precat ?f ?g

F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: z_iso a b
C' ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
 exact (# F f).
    
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: z_iso a b
C' ⟦ F b, F a ⟧
 exact (# F (inv_from_z_iso f)).
    
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: z_iso a b
is_inverse_in_precat (# F f) (# F (inv_from_z_iso f))
 exact (functor_on_is_inverse_in_precat F f).
  Defined.

  
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: z_iso a b
functor_on_z_iso F (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) =
z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F f)

  
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: z_iso a b
functor_on_z_iso F (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso f) =
z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F f)

    
C, C': category
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: z_iso a b
# F (inv_from_z_iso f) =
inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F f)

    apply idpath.
  Defined.

  
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: is_z_isomorphism f
inv_from_z_iso
  (make_z_iso (# F f)
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor
        (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F H))
     (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F H)) =
# F
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (make_z_iso f (is_z_isomorphism_mor H) H))

  
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: is_z_isomorphism f
inv_from_z_iso
  (make_z_iso (# F f)
     (is_z_isomorphism_mor
        (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F H))
     (functor_on_is_z_isomorphism F H)) =
# F
  (inv_from_z_iso
     (make_z_iso f (is_z_isomorphism_mor H) H))

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

End functors_on_iso_with_inv.

(** ** Functors and [idtoiso] *)

Section functors_and_idtoiso.

Variables C D : category.
Variable F : functor C D.


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
a, b: C
e: a = b
idtoiso (maponpaths F e) =
functor_on_z_iso F (idtoiso e)


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
a, b: C
e: a = b
idtoiso (maponpaths F e) =
functor_on_z_iso F (idtoiso e)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
a: C
idtoiso (maponpaths F (idpath a)) =
functor_on_z_iso F (idtoiso (idpath a))

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
a: C
idtoiso (maponpaths F (idpath a)) =
functor_on_z_iso F (idtoiso (idpath a))

  apply (! functor_id _ _ ).
Qed.


Hypothesis HC : is_univalent C.
Hypothesis HD : is_univalent D.


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
a, b: C
i: z_iso a b
maponpaths F (isotoid C HC i) =
isotoid D HD (functor_on_z_iso F i)


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
a, b: C
i: z_iso a b
maponpaths F (isotoid C HC i) =
isotoid D HD (functor_on_z_iso F i)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
a, b: C
i: z_iso a b
make_weq idtoiso (HD (F a) (F b))
  (maponpaths F (isotoid C HC i)) =
make_weq idtoiso (HD (F a) (F b))
  (isotoid D HD (functor_on_z_iso F i))

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
a, b: C
i: z_iso a b
idtoiso (maponpaths F (isotoid C HC i)) =
idtoiso (isotoid D HD (functor_on_z_iso F i))

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
a, b: C
i: z_iso a b
functor_on_z_iso F (idtoiso (isotoid C HC i)) =
idtoiso (isotoid D HD (functor_on_z_iso F i))

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
a, b: C
i: z_iso a b
functor_on_z_iso F i = functor_on_z_iso F i

  apply idpath.
Qed.

End functors_and_idtoiso.


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
a, b: C
e: a = b
pr1 (idtoiso (maponpaths F e)) = # F (pr1 (idtoiso e))


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
a, b: C
e: a = b
pr1 (idtoiso (maponpaths F e)) = # F (pr1 (idtoiso e))

  exact (maponpaths pr1 (maponpaths_idtoiso _ _ F _ _ e)).
Qed.


Setting F constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"# _".



C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
p: x₁ = x₂
f: C₂ ⟦ F x₁, y ⟧
idtoiso (maponpaths (λ z : C₁, F z) (! p)) · f =
transportf (λ z : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F z, y ⟧) p f


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
p: x₁ = x₂
f: C₂ ⟦ F x₁, y ⟧
idtoiso (maponpaths (λ z : C₁, F z) (! p)) · f =
transportf (λ z : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F z, y ⟧) p f

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
y: C₂
x₁: C₁
f: C₂ ⟦ F x₁, y ⟧
idtoiso (maponpaths (λ z : C₁, F z) (! idpath x₁)) · f =
transportf (λ z : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F z, y ⟧) (idpath x₁) f

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
y: C₂
x₁: C₁
f: C₂ ⟦ F x₁, y ⟧
identity (F x₁) · f = f

  apply id_left.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
p: x₁ = x₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y, F x₁ ⟧
f · idtoiso (maponpaths (λ z : C₁, F z) p) =
transportf (λ z : C₁, C₂ ⟦ y, F z ⟧) p f


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
p: x₁ = x₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y, F x₁ ⟧
f · idtoiso (maponpaths (λ z : C₁, F z) p) =
transportf (λ z : C₁, C₂ ⟦ y, F z ⟧) p f

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
y: C₂
x₁: C₁
f: C₂ ⟦ y, F x₁ ⟧
f · idtoiso (maponpaths (λ z : C₁, F z) (idpath x₁)) =
transportf (λ z : C₁, C₂ ⟦ y, F z ⟧) (idpath x₁) f

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
y: C₂
x₁: C₁
f: C₂ ⟦ y, F x₁ ⟧
f · identity (F x₁) = f

  apply id_right.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: is_univalent C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
i: z_iso x₁ x₂
f: C₂ ⟦ F x₁, y ⟧
transportf (λ z : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F z, y ⟧)
  (isotoid C₁ HC₁ i) f = # F (inv_from_z_iso i) · f


C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: is_univalent C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
i: z_iso x₁ x₂
f: C₂ ⟦ F x₁, y ⟧
transportf (λ z : C₁, C₂ ⟦ F z, y ⟧)
  (isotoid C₁ HC₁ i) f = # F (inv_from_z_iso i) · f

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: is_univalent C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
i: z_iso x₁ x₂
f: C₂ ⟦ F x₁, y ⟧
idtoiso
  (maponpaths (λ z : C₁, F z) (! isotoid C₁ HC₁ i))
· f = # F (inv_from_z_iso i) · f

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: is_univalent C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
i: z_iso x₁ x₂
f: C₂ ⟦ F x₁, y ⟧
functor_on_z_iso F (idtoiso (! isotoid C₁ HC₁ i)) · f =
# F (inv_from_z_iso i) · f

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: is_univalent C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
i: z_iso x₁ x₂
f: C₂ ⟦ F x₁, y ⟧
functor_on_z_iso F
  (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (isotoid C₁ HC₁ i)))
· f = # F (inv_from_z_iso i) · f

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: is_univalent C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
i: z_iso x₁ x₂
f: C₂ ⟦ F x₁, y ⟧
functor_on_z_iso F (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso i) · f =
# F (inv_from_z_iso i) · f

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: is_univalent C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
i: z_iso x₁ x₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y, F x₁ ⟧
transportf (λ z : C₁, C₂ ⟦ y, F z ⟧)
  (isotoid C₁ HC₁ i) f = f · # F i


C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: is_univalent C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
i: z_iso x₁ x₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y, F x₁ ⟧
transportf (λ z : C₁, C₂ ⟦ y, F z ⟧)
  (isotoid C₁ HC₁ i) f = f · # F i

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: is_univalent C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
i: z_iso x₁ x₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y, F x₁ ⟧
f
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths (λ z : C₁, F z) (isotoid C₁ HC₁ i)) =
f · # F i

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: is_univalent C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
i: z_iso x₁ x₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y, F x₁ ⟧
f · functor_on_z_iso F (idtoiso (isotoid C₁ HC₁ i)) =
f · # F i

  
C₁, C₂: category
HC₁: is_univalent C₁
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
y: C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
i: z_iso x₁ x₂
f: C₂ ⟦ y, F x₁ ⟧
f · functor_on_z_iso F i = f · # F i

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
p: x₁ = x₂
i: z_iso (F x₁) y
pr1 (transportf (λ x : C₁, z_iso (F x) y) p i) =
# F (inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso p)) · i


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x₁, x₂: C₁
y: C₂
p: x₁ = x₂
i: z_iso (F x₁) y
pr1 (transportf (λ x : C₁, z_iso (F x) y) p i) =
# F (inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso p)) · i

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x₁: C₁
y: C₂
i: z_iso (F x₁) y
pr1 i = # F (identity x₁) · i

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x₁: C₁
y: C₂
i: z_iso (F x₁) y
pr1 i = identity (F x₁) · i

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x₁: C₁
y: C₂
i: z_iso (F x₁) y
pr1 i = i

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(** ** Functors preserve inverses *)


C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: z_iso a b
# F (inv_from_z_iso f) =
inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F f)


C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
f: z_iso a b
# F (inv_from_z_iso f) =
inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F f)

  
C, C': precategory
F: C ⟶ C'
a, b: C
pr1: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
pr2: is_z_isomorphism pr1
# F (inv_from_z_iso (pr1,, pr2)) =
inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F (pr1,, pr2))

  apply functor_on_inv_from_z_iso'.
Qed.

(** ** Conservative functors *)

(** The generic property of "reflecting" a property of a morphism. *)

Definition reflects_morphism {C D : category} (F : functor C D)
           (P : ∏ (C : category) (a b : ob C), C⟦a, b⟧ → UU) : UU :=
  ∏ a b f, P D (F a) (F b) (# F f) → P C a b f.

(** These are functors that reflect isomorphisms. F : C ⟶ D is conservative
    if whenever # F f is an iso, so is f. *)

Definition conservative {C D : category} (F : functor C D) : UU :=
  reflects_morphism F (@is_z_isomorphism).


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
isaprop (conservative F)


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
isaprop (conservative F)

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
t, t0: C
t1: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t2: is_z_isomorphism (# F t1)
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ _ : is_z_isomorphism (# F t1),
    (λ C : category, @is_z_isomorphism C) C t t0 t1)
     t2)

  apply isaprop_is_z_isomorphism.
Qed.

(** ** Composition of functors, identity functors *)

(** *** Composition *)

Definition functor_composite_data {C C' C'' : precategory_ob_mor } (F : functor_data C C')
           (F' : functor_data C' C'') : functor_data C C'' :=
  functor_data_constr C C'' (λ a, F' (F a))  (λ (a b : ob C) f, #F' (#F f)) .



C, C', C'': precategory_data
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
is_functor (functor_composite_data F F')


C, C', C'': precategory_data
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
is_functor (functor_composite_data F F')

  
C, C', C'': precategory_data
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
functor_idax (functor_composite_data F F')
C, C', C'': precategory_data
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
functor_compax (functor_composite_data F F')

  
C, C', C'': precategory_data
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
a: C
# (functor_composite_data F F') (identity a) =
identity (functor_composite_data F F' a)
C, C', C'': precategory_data
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
functor_compax (functor_composite_data F F')

  
C, C', C'': precategory_data
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
a: C
e1: # F (identity a) = identity (F a)
# (functor_composite_data F F') (identity a) =
identity (functor_composite_data F F' a)
C, C', C'': precategory_data
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
functor_compax (functor_composite_data F F')

  
C, C', C'': precategory_data
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
a: C
e1: # F (identity a) = identity (F a)
e2: # F' (identity (F a)) = identity (F' (F a))
# (functor_composite_data F F') (identity a) =
identity (functor_composite_data F F' a)
C, C', C'': precategory_data
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
functor_compax (functor_composite_data F F')

  
C, C', C'': precategory_data
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
functor_compax (functor_composite_data F F')


  
C, C', C'': precategory_data
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
∏ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
# (functor_composite_data F F') (f · g) =
# (functor_composite_data F F') f
· # (functor_composite_data F F') g
  
C, C', C'': precategory_data
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
# (functor_composite_data F F') (f · g) =
# (functor_composite_data F F') f
· # (functor_composite_data F F') g

  
C, C', C'': precategory_data
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
e1: # F (f · g) = # F f · # F g
# (functor_composite_data F F') (f · g) =
# (functor_composite_data F F') f
· # (functor_composite_data F F') g

  
C, C', C'': precategory_data
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
e1: # F (f · g) = # F f · # F g
e2: # F' (# F f · # F g) =
# F' (# F f) · # F' (# F g)
# (functor_composite_data F F') (f · g) =
# (functor_composite_data F F') f
· # (functor_composite_data F F') g

  apply ( ( maponpaths ( # F' ) e1 ) @ e2 ) .
Defined.


Definition functor_composite {C C' C'' : precategory_data} (F : functor C C') (F' : functor C' C'') :
  functor C C'' := tpair _ _ (is_functor_composite F F').

(** *** Identity functor *)

Definition functor_identity_data ( C  : precategory_data ) : functor_data C C :=
  functor_data_constr C C (λ a, a) (λ (a b : ob C) f, f) .


C: precategory_data
is_functor (functor_identity_data C)


C: precategory_data
is_functor (functor_identity_data C)

  
C: precategory_data
functor_idax (functor_identity_data C)
C: precategory_data
functor_compax (functor_identity_data C)

  
C: precategory_data
∏ a : C,
# (functor_identity_data C) (identity a) =
identity (functor_identity_data C a)
C: precategory_data
functor_compax (functor_identity_data C)
 
C: precategory_data
functor_compax (functor_identity_data C)

  
C: precategory_data
∏ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
# (functor_identity_data C) (f · g) =
# (functor_identity_data C) f
· # (functor_identity_data C) g
 intros; apply idpath.
Defined.

Definition functor_identity (C : precategory_data) : functor C C :=
  tpair _ _ ( is_functor_identity C ) .

(** *** Constant functor *)

Section Constant_Functor.
Variables C D : precategory.
Variable d : D.

Definition constant_functor_data: functor_data C D :=
   functor_data_constr C D (λ _, d) (λ _ _ _ , identity _) .


C, D: precategory
d: D
is_functor constant_functor_data


C, D: precategory
d: D
is_functor constant_functor_data

  
C, D: precategory
d: D
functor_idax constant_functor_data
C, D: precategory
d: D
functor_compax constant_functor_data

  
C, D: precategory
d: D
functor_compax constant_functor_data

  
C, D: precategory
d: D
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
identity d = identity d · identity d

  
C, D: precategory
d: D
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
identity d · identity d = identity d

  apply id_left.
Qed.

Definition constant_functor: functor C D := tpair _ _ is_functor_constant.

End Constant_Functor.


C: precategory
F: C ⟶ C
n: nat
C ⟶ C


C: precategory
F: C ⟶ C
n: nat
C ⟶ C

  
C: precategory
F: C ⟶ C
C ⟶ C
C: precategory
F: C ⟶ C
n: nat
IHn: C ⟶ C
C ⟶ C

  
C: precategory
F: C ⟶ C
C ⟶ C
 apply functor_identity.
  
C: precategory
F: C ⟶ C
n: nat
IHn: C ⟶ C
C ⟶ C
 apply (functor_composite IHn F).
Defined.

End functors.

(** Notations do not survive the end of sections, so we redeclare them here. *)
Notation "a ⟶ b" := (functor a b) : cat.
Notation "# F" := (functor_on_morphisms F) (at level 3) : cat.

(** ** Fully faithful functors *)

Definition fully_faithful {C D : precategory_data} (F : functor C D) :=
  ∏ a b : ob C,
    isweq (functor_on_morphisms F (a:=a) (b:=b)).


C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
isaprop (fully_faithful F)


C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
isaprop (fully_faithful F)

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
a: C
isofhlevel 1 (∏ b : C, isweq # F)

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
a, b: C
isofhlevel 1 (isweq # F)

  apply isapropisweq.
Qed.


C: precategory_data
fully_faithful (functor_identity C)


C: precategory_data
fully_faithful (functor_identity C)

  
C: precategory_data
a, b: C
isweq # (functor_identity C)

  apply idisweq.
Defined.


C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧


C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
C ⟦ a, b ⟧ ≃ D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
isweq # F

  exact (FF a b).
Defined.

Definition fully_faithful_inv_hom {C D : precategory_data} {F : functor C D}
      (FF : fully_faithful F) (a b : ob C) :
      F a --> F b -> a --> b :=
 invweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b).

Local Notation "FF ^-1" := (fully_faithful_inv_hom FF _ _ ).

(** FF^1 is indeed post-inverse to # F. *)

C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
FF ^-1 (# F f) = f


C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
FF ^-1 (# F f) = f

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) (# F f) = f

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
# F f = weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b f

  reflexivity.
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fully_faithful F
x, y: C₁
f: C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
# F (HF ^-1 f) = f


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fully_faithful F
x, y: C₁
f: C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
# F (HF ^-1 f) = f

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: fully_faithful F
x, y: C₁
f: C₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
# F (invweq (weq_from_fully_faithful HF x y) f) = f

  exact (homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful HF x y) f).
Qed.


C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a: C
FF ^-1 (identity (F a)) = identity a


C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a: C
FF ^-1 (identity (F a)) = identity a

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a: C
weq_from_fully_faithful FF a a
  (FF ^-1 (identity (F a))) =
weq_from_fully_faithful FF a a (identity a)

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a: C
weq_from_fully_faithful FF a a
  (invweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a a)
     (identity (F a))) =
weq_from_fully_faithful FF a a (identity a)

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a: C
HFaa:= homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a a) (identity (F a)): weq_from_fully_faithful FF a a
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a a)
     (identity (F a))) = 
identity (F a)
weq_from_fully_faithful FF a a
  (invweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a a)
     (identity (F a))) =
weq_from_fully_faithful FF a a (identity a)

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a: C
HFaa:= homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a a) (identity (F a)): # F
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a a)
     (identity (F a))) = 
identity (F a)
# F
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a a)
     (identity (F a))) = # F (identity a)

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a: C
HFaa:= homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a a) (identity (F a)): # F
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a a)
     (identity (F a))) = 
identity (F a)
identity (F a) = # F (identity a)

  rewrite functor_id; apply idpath.
Qed.



C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b, c: C
f: D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g: D ⟦ F b, F c ⟧
FF ^-1 (f · g) = FF ^-1 f · FF ^-1 g


C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b, c: C
f: D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g: D ⟦ F b, F c ⟧
FF ^-1 (f · g) = FF ^-1 f · FF ^-1 g

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b, c: C
f: D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g: D ⟦ F b, F c ⟧
weq_from_fully_faithful FF a c (FF ^-1 (f · g)) =
weq_from_fully_faithful FF a c (FF ^-1 f · FF ^-1 g)

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b, c: C
f: D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g: D ⟦ F b, F c ⟧
HFFac:= homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a c)
  (f · g): weq_from_fully_faithful FF a c
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a c)
     (f · g)) = f · g
weq_from_fully_faithful FF a c (FF ^-1 (f · g)) =
weq_from_fully_faithful FF a c (FF ^-1 f · FF ^-1 g)

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b, c: C
f: D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g: D ⟦ F b, F c ⟧
HFFac:= homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a c)
  (f · g): weq_from_fully_faithful FF a c
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a c)
     (f · g)) = f · g
weq_from_fully_faithful FF a c
  (invweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a c) (f · g)) =
weq_from_fully_faithful FF a c
  (invweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) f
   · invweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b c) g)

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b, c: C
f: D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g: D ⟦ F b, F c ⟧
HFFac:= homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a c)
  (f · g): # F
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a c)
     (f · g)) = f · g
# F (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a c) (f · g)) =
# F
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) f
   · invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b c) g)

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b, c: C
f: D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g: D ⟦ F b, F c ⟧
f · g =
# F
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) f
   · invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b c) g)

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b, c: C
f: D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g: D ⟦ F b, F c ⟧
f · g =
# F (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) f)
· # F (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b c) g)

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b, c: C
f: D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g: D ⟦ F b, F c ⟧
HFFab:= homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b)
  f: weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) f) =
f
f · g =
# F (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) f)
· # F (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b c) g)

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b, c: C
f: D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g: D ⟦ F b, F c ⟧
HFFab:= homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b)
  f: weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) f) =
f
HFFbc:= homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b c)
  g: weq_from_fully_faithful FF b c
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b c) g) =
g
f · g =
# F (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) f)
· # F (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b c) g)

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b, c: C
f: D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g: D ⟦ F b, F c ⟧
HFFab:= homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b)
  f: # F
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) f) =
f
HFFbc:= homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b c)
  g: # F
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b c) g) =
g
f · g =
# F (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) f)
· # F (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b c) g)

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b, c: C
f: D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g: D ⟦ F b, F c ⟧
HFFbc:= homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b c)
  g: # F
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b c) g) =
g
f · g =
f · # F (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b c) g)

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b, c: C
f: D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g: D ⟦ F b, F c ⟧
f · g = f · g

  apply idpath.
Qed.



(** *** Fully faithful functors reflect isos *)


C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: z_iso (F a) (F b)
is_inverse_in_precat (FF ^-1 f)
  (FF ^-1 (inv_from_z_iso f))


C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: z_iso (F a) (F b)
is_inverse_in_precat (FF ^-1 f)
  (FF ^-1 (inv_from_z_iso f))

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: z_iso (F a) (F b)
is_inverse_in_precat
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) f)
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a)
     (inv_from_z_iso f))

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: z_iso (F a) (F b)
invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) f
· invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a)
    (inv_from_z_iso f) = identity a
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: z_iso (F a) (F b)
invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a)
  (inv_from_z_iso f)
· invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) f =
identity b

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C

weq_from_fully_faithful FF a a
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) f
   · invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a)
       (inv_from_z_iso f)) =
weq_from_fully_faithful FF a a (identity a)

F: C ⟶ D

invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a)
  (inv_from_z_iso f)
· invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) f =
identity b

F: C ⟶ D

a, b: C
f: z_iso (F a) (F b)
HFFab:= homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b): ∏ y : D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) y) =
y
weq_from_fully_faithful FF a a
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) f
   · invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a)
       (inv_from_z_iso f)) =
weq_from_fully_faithful FF a a (identity a)

identity b

  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) y) =
y

weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a) y) =
y
weq_from_fully_faithful FF a a
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) f
   · invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a)
       (inv_from_z_iso f)) =
weq_from_fully_faithful FF a a (identity a)

F: C ⟶ D

invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a)
  (inv_from_z_iso f)
· invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) f =
identity b

  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) y) =
y

# F
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a) y) =
y

   · invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a)
       (inv_from_z_iso f)) = # F (identity a)

       (inv_from_z_iso f)) = # F (identity a)

f

  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) y) =

  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a) y) =

y

# F
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a) y) =
y

     (inv_from_z_iso f)
   · invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) f) =
# F (identity b)

# F
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a) y) =
y
# F
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a)
     (inv_from_z_iso f))
· # F (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) f) =
# F (identity b)

F: C ⟶ D

a, b: C

  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) y) =
y
HFFba:= homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a): ∏ y : D ⟦ F b, F a ⟧,
# F
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a) y) =
y
# F
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a)
     (inv_from_z_iso f)) · f = # F (identity b)

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: z_iso (F a) (F b)
HFFab:= homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b): ∏ y : D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
# F
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) y) =
y
HFFba:= homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a): ∏ y : D ⟦ F b, F a ⟧,
# F
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a) y) =
y
inv_from_z_iso f · f = # F (identity b)

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: z_iso (F a) (F b)
HFFab:= homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b): ∏ y : D ⟦ F a, F b ⟧,
# F
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF a b) y) =
y
HFFba:= homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a): ∏ y : D ⟦ F b, F a ⟧,
# F
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful FF b a) y) =
y
inv_from_z_iso f · f = identity (F b)

  apply z_iso_after_z_iso_inv.
Qed.


C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: z_iso (F a) (F b)
is_z_isomorphism (FF ^-1 f)


C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: z_iso (F a) (F b)
is_z_isomorphism (FF ^-1 f)

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: z_iso (F a) (F b)
is_inverse_in_precat (FF ^-1 f)
  (FF ^-1 (inv_from_z_iso f))

  apply inv_of_ff_inv_is_inv.
Defined.

(** A slight restatement of the above: fully faithful functors are conservative. *)

C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
conservative F


C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
conservative F

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
reflects_morphism F
  (λ C : category, @is_z_isomorphism C)

F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_iso_Ff: is_z_isomorphism (# F f)
is_z_isomorphism f

F: C ⟶ D

C ⟦ a, b ⟧

F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_iso_Ff: is_z_isomorphism (# F f)
?x = f
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_iso_Ff: is_z_isomorphism (# F f)
is_z_isomorphism ?x

  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_iso_Ff: is_z_isomorphism (# F f)
C ⟦ a, b ⟧
 exact (FF^-1 (# F f)).
  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_iso_Ff: is_z_isomorphism (# F f)
FF ^-1 (# F f) = f
 apply fully_faithful_inv_hom_is_inv.
  
C, D: category
F: C ⟶ D
FF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_iso_Ff: is_z_isomorphism (# F f)
is_z_isomorphism (FF ^-1 (# F f))
 apply (fully_faithful_reflects_iso_proof _ _ _ _ _ _ (_,,is_iso_Ff)).
Defined.

f: z_iso (F a) (F b)

  (iso_from_fully_faithful_reflection HF f) = f

  (iso_from_fully_faithful_reflection HF f) = f

  
C: precategory
D: category
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: z_iso (F a) (F b)
functor_on_z_iso F
  (iso_from_fully_faithful_reflection HF f) = f

  simpl;
  apply (homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful HF a b)).
Qed.

C: precategory
D: category
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: z_iso (F a) (F b)
# F (HF ^-1 f) = f

  apply (homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful HF a b ) ).
Qed.

(** Alternative implementation of [weq_ff_functor_on_iso] *)

Definition reflects_isos {C D : precategory} (F : C ⟶ D) :=
  ∏ c c' (f : C⟦c,c'⟧), is_z_isomorphism (# F f) → is_z_isomorphism f.


C: category
D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
isaprop (reflects_isos F)


C: category
D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
isaprop (reflects_isos F)


C: category
D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
isofhlevel 1
  (∏ f : C ⟦ c, c' ⟧,
   is_z_isomorphism (# F f) → is_z_isomorphism f)


C: category
D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
c, c': C
f: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
f': is_z_isomorphism (# F f)
isofhlevel 1 (is_z_isomorphism f)

apply isaprop_is_z_isomorphism.
Qed.


C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
reflects_isos F


C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
reflects_isos F

F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: is_z_isomorphism (# F f)
is_z_isomorphism f

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: is_z_isomorphism (# F f)
X:= fully_faithful_reflects_iso_proof C D F HF a b
  (# F f,, H): is_z_isomorphism (HF ^-1 (# F f,, H))
is_z_isomorphism f

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: is_z_isomorphism (# F f)
X:= fully_faithful_reflects_iso_proof C D F HF a b
  (# F f,, H): is_z_isomorphism (HF ^-1 (# F f))
is_z_isomorphism f

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: is_z_isomorphism (# F f)
X:= fully_faithful_reflects_iso_proof C D F HF a b
  (# F f,, H): is_z_isomorphism (HF ^-1 (# F f))
T:= homotinvweqweq (weq_from_fully_faithful HF a b): ∏ x : C ⟦ a, b ⟧,
invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful HF a b)
  (weq_from_fully_faithful HF a b x) = x
is_z_isomorphism f

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: is_z_isomorphism (# F f)
X:= fully_faithful_reflects_iso_proof C D F HF a b
  (# F f,, H): is_z_isomorphism (HF ^-1 (# F f))
T:= homotinvweqweq (weq_from_fully_faithful HF a b): ∏ x : C ⟦ a, b ⟧,
invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful HF a b) (# F x) =
x
is_z_isomorphism f

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: is_z_isomorphism (# F f)
X:= fully_faithful_reflects_iso_proof C D F HF a b
  (# F f,, H): is_z_isomorphism
  (invweq (weq_from_fully_faithful HF a b) (# F f))
T:= homotinvweqweq (weq_from_fully_faithful HF a b): ∏ x : C ⟦ a, b ⟧,
invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful HF a b) (# F x) =
x
is_z_isomorphism f

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: is_z_isomorphism (# F f)
X:= fully_faithful_reflects_iso_proof C D F HF a b
  (# F f,, H): is_z_isomorphism
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful HF a b) (# F f))
T:= homotinvweqweq (weq_from_fully_faithful HF a b): ∏ x : C ⟦ a, b ⟧,
invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful HF a b) (# F x) =
x
is_z_isomorphism f

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
H: is_z_isomorphism (# F f)
X: is_z_isomorphism f
T:= homotinvweqweq (weq_from_fully_faithful HF a b): ∏ x : C ⟦ a, b ⟧,
invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful HF a b) (# F x) =
x
is_z_isomorphism f

  apply X.
Defined.

isofhlevelf 1 F

HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
d: D
c: C
e: F c = d
c': C
e': F c' = d
c,, e = c',, e'

HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
d: D
c: C
e: F c = d
c': C
e': F c' = d
pr1 (c,, e) = pr1 (c',, e')
C, D: category
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
d: D
c: C
e: F c = d
c': C
e': F c' = d
transportf (λ x : C, F x = d) ?p (pr2 (c,, e)) =
pr2 (c',, e')

HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
