HF: fully_faithful F
d: D
c: C
e: F c = d
c': C
e': F c' = d
c = c'

    
C, D: category
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
d: D
c: C
e: F c = d
c': C
e': F c' = d
X:= idtoiso (e @ ! e'): z_iso (F c) (F c')
c = c'

    (* set (X' := invmap (@weq_ff_functor_on_iso _ _ _ HF _ _ ) X). *)
        (* we cannot use X' because we lack the preceding, commented-out,
           lemma *)
    
C, D: category
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
d: D
c: C
e: F c = d
c': C
e': F c' = d
X:= idtoiso (e @ ! e'): z_iso (F c) (F c')
X2:= iso_from_fully_faithful_reflection HF X: z_iso c c'
c = c'

    apply (isotoid _ HC X2).
  
C, D: category
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
d: D
c: C
e: F c = d
c': C
e': F c' = d
transportf (λ x : C, F x = d)
  ((let X := idtoiso (e @ ! e') in
    let X2 := iso_from_fully_faithful_reflection HF X
      in
    isotoid C HC X2)
   :
   pr1 (c,, e) = pr1 (c',, e')) (pr2 (c,, e)) =
pr2 (c',, e')
 
C, D: category
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
d: D
c: C
e: F c = d
c': C
e': F c' = d
transportf (λ x : C, F x = d)
  (isotoid C HC
     (iso_from_fully_faithful_reflection HF
        (idtoiso (e @ ! e')))) e = e'

    
C, D: category
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
d: D
c: C
e: F c = d
c': C
e': F c' = d
T:= functtransportf F: ∏ (P : D → UU) (x x' : C) (e : x = x')
(p : P (F x)),
transportf (λ x0 : C, P (F x0)) e p =
transportf P (maponpaths F e) p
transportf (λ x : C, F x = d)
  (isotoid C HC
     (iso_from_fully_faithful_reflection HF
        (idtoiso (e @ ! e')))) e = e'

    
C, D: category
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
d: D
c: C
e: F c = d
c': C
e': F c' = d
T:= functtransportf F: ∏ (P : D → UU) (x x' : C) (e : x = x')
(p : P (F x)),
transportf (λ x0 : C, P (F x0)) e p =
transportf P (maponpaths F e) p
T':= T (λ c : D, c = d): ∏ (x x' : C) (e : x = x')
(p : (λ c : D, c = d) (F x)),
transportf (λ x0 : C, (λ c : D, c = d) (F x0)) e
  p =
transportf (λ c : D, c = d) (maponpaths F e) p
transportf (λ x : C, F x = d)
  (isotoid C HC
     (iso_from_fully_faithful_reflection HF
        (idtoiso (e @ ! e')))) e = e'
 
C, D: category
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
d: D
c: C
e: F c = d
c': C
e': F c' = d
T:= functtransportf F: ∏ (P : D → UU) (x x' : C) (e : x = x')
(p : P (F x)),
transportf (λ x0 : C, P (F x0)) e p =
transportf P (maponpaths F e) p
T':= T (λ c : D, c = d): ∏ (x x' : C) (e : x = x') (p : F x = d),
transportf (λ x0 : C, F x0 = d) e p =
transportf (λ c : D, c = d) (maponpaths F e) p
transportf (λ x : C, F x = d)
  (isotoid C HC
     (iso_from_fully_faithful_reflection HF
        (idtoiso (e @ ! e')))) e = e'

    
C, D: category
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
d: D
c: C
e: F c = d
c': C
e': F c' = d
T:= functtransportf F: ∏ (P : D → UU) (x x' : C) (e : x = x')
(p : P (F x)),
transportf (λ x0 : C, P (F x0)) e p =
transportf P (maponpaths F e) p
T':= T (λ c : D, c = d): ∏ (x x' : C) (e : x = x') (p : F x = d),
transportf (λ x0 : C, F x0 = d) e p =
transportf (λ c : D, c = d) (maponpaths F e) p
transportf (λ c : D, c = d)
  (maponpaths F
     (isotoid C HC
        (iso_from_fully_faithful_reflection HF
           (idtoiso (e @ ! e'))))) e = e'

    
C, D: category
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
d: D
c: C
e: F c = d
c': C
e': F c' = d
T:= functtransportf F: ∏ (P : D → UU) (x x' : C) (e : x = x')
(p : P (F x)),
transportf (λ x0 : C, P (F x0)) e p =
transportf P (maponpaths F e) p
T':= T (λ c : D, c = d): ∏ (x x' : C) (e : x = x') (p : F x = d),
transportf (λ x0 : C, F x0 = d) e p =
transportf (λ c : D, c = d) (maponpaths F e) p
transportf (λ c : D, c = d)
  (isotoid D HD
     (functor_on_z_iso F
        (iso_from_fully_faithful_reflection HF
           (idtoiso (e @ ! e'))))) e = e'

    
C, D: category
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
d: D
c: C
e: F c = d
c': C
e': F c' = d
T:= functtransportf F: ∏ (P : D → UU) (x x' : C) (e : x = x')
(p : P (F x)),
transportf (λ x0 : C, P (F x0)) e p =
transportf P (maponpaths F e) p
T':= T (λ c : D, c = d): ∏ (x x' : C) (e : x = x') (p : F x = d),
transportf (λ x0 : C, F x0 = d) e p =
transportf (λ c : D, c = d) (maponpaths F e) p
transportf (λ c : D, c = d)
  (isotoid D HD (idtoiso (e @ ! e'))) e = e'

    
C, D: category
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
d: D
c: C
e: F c = d
c': C
e': F c' = d
T:= functtransportf F: ∏ (P : D → UU) (x x' : C) (e : x = x')
(p : P (F x)),
transportf (λ x0 : C, P (F x0)) e p =
transportf P (maponpaths F e) p
T':= T (λ c : D, c = d): ∏ (x x' : C) (e : x = x') (p : F x = d),
transportf (λ x0 : C, F x0 = d) e p =
transportf (λ c : D, c = d) (maponpaths F e) p
transportf (λ c : D, c = d) (e @ ! e') e = e'

    
C, D: category
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
d: D
c: C
e: F c = d
c': C
e': F c' = d
T:= functtransportf F: ∏ (P : D → UU) (x x' : C) (e : x = x')
(p : P (F x)),
transportf (λ x0 : C, P (F x0)) e p =
transportf P (maponpaths F e) p
T':= T (λ c : D, c = d): ∏ (x x' : C) (e : x = x') (p : F x = d),
transportf (λ x0 : C, F x0 = d) e p =
transportf (λ c : D, c = d) (maponpaths F e) p
! (e @ ! e') @ e = e'

    
C, D: category
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
d: D
c: C
e: F c = d
c': C
e': F c' = d
T:= functtransportf F: ∏ (P : D → UU) (x x' : C) (e : x = x')
(p : P (F x)),
transportf (λ x0 : C, P (F x0)) e p =
transportf P (maponpaths F e) p
T':= T (λ c : D, c = d): ∏ (x x' : C) (e : x = x') (p : F x = d),
transportf (λ x0 : C, F x0 = d) e p =
transportf (λ c : D, c = d) (maponpaths F e) p
(! (! e') @ ! e) @ e = e'

    
C, D: category
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
d: D
c: C
e: F c = d
c': C
e': F c' = d
T:= functtransportf F: ∏ (P : D → UU) (x x' : C) (e : x = x')
(p : P (F x)),
transportf (λ x0 : C, P (F x0)) e p =
transportf P (maponpaths F e) p
T':= T (λ c : D, c = d): ∏ (x x' : C) (e : x = x') (p : F x = d),
transportf (λ x0 : C, F x0 = d) e p =
transportf (λ c : D, c = d) (maponpaths F e) p
(e' @ ! e) @ e = e'

    
C, D: category
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
d: D
c: C
e: F c = d
c': C
e': F c' = d
T:= functtransportf F: ∏ (P : D → UU) (x x' : C) (e : x = x')
(p : P (F x)),
transportf (λ x0 : C, P (F x0)) e p =
transportf P (maponpaths F e) p
T':= T (λ c : D, c = d): ∏ (x x' : C) (e : x = x') (p : F x = d),
transportf (λ x0 : C, F x0 = d) e p =
transportf (λ c : D, c = d) (maponpaths F e) p
e' @ ! e @ e = e'

    
C, D: category
HC: is_univalent C
HD: is_univalent D
F: C ⟶ D
HF: fully_faithful F
d: D
c: C
e: F c = d
c': C
e': F c' = d
T:= functtransportf F: ∏ (P : D → UU) (x x' : C) (e : x = x')
(p : P (F x)),
transportf (λ x0 : C, P (F x0)) e p =
transportf P (maponpaths F e) p
T':= T (λ c : D, c = d): ∏ (x x' : C) (e : x = x') (p : F x = d),
transportf (λ x0 : C, F x0 = d) e p =
transportf (λ c : D, c = d) (maponpaths F e) p
e' @ idpath d = e'

    apply pathscomp0rid.
Qed.


(** ** (Split) essentially surjective functors *)

(** See [CategoryTheory.equivalences] for more lemmas about (split) essential
    surjectivity, especially where the domain is a [univalent_category]. *)

(** See "Univalent categories and the Rezk completion" (arXiv:1303.0584v2)
    Definition 6.5. *)
Definition split_essentially_surjective {C D : precategory_data} (F : functor C D) :=
  ∏ b, (∑ a : ob C, z_iso (F a) b).

(** Split essentially surjective functors have "inverses" on objects, where we
    map d : ob D to the c : ob C such that F c ≅ d. *)
Definition split_essentially_surjective_inv_on_obj {C D : precategory_data}
           (F : functor C D) (HF : split_essentially_surjective F) : ob D → ob C :=
  λ d, (pr1 (HF d)).

Definition essentially_surjective {C D : precategory_data} (F : functor C D) :=
  ∏ b, ishinh (total2 (λ a, z_iso (F a) b)).


C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
isaprop (essentially_surjective F)


C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
isaprop (essentially_surjective F)

  apply impred; intro; apply isapropishinh.
Defined.


C: category
essentially_surjective (functor_identity C)


C: category
essentially_surjective (functor_identity C)

  
C: category
x: C
∃ a : C, z_iso (functor_identity C a) x

  
C: category
x: C
∑ a : C, z_iso (functor_identity C a) x

  
C: category
x: C
z_iso (functor_identity C x) x

  apply identity_z_iso.
Qed.

(** Composition of essentially surjective functors yields an essentially
    surjective functor. *)

(** Let e : E. Since G is essentially surjective, there is some g
    such that e ≅ G g. Since F is essentially surjective, there is some f
    such that G g ≅ F f. Composing these isomorphisms proves the goal.
 *)

C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
esF: essentially_surjective F
G: D ⟶ E
esG: essentially_surjective G
essentially_surjective (functor_composite F G)


C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
esF: essentially_surjective F
G: D ⟶ E
esG: essentially_surjective G
essentially_surjective (functor_composite F G)

  
C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
esF: essentially_surjective F
G: D ⟶ E
esG: essentially_surjective G
∏ b : E, ∃ a : C, z_iso (functor_composite F G a) b

  
C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
esF: essentially_surjective F
G: D ⟶ E
esG: essentially_surjective G
e: E
∃ a : C, z_iso (functor_composite F G a) e

  
C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
esF: essentially_surjective F
G: D ⟶ E
esG: essentially_surjective G
e: E
isoGe: ∑ a : D, z_iso (G a) e
∃ a : C, z_iso (functor_composite F G a) e

  
C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
esF: essentially_surjective F
G: D ⟶ E
esG: essentially_surjective G
e: E
isoGe: ∑ a : D, z_iso (G a) e
isoFGe: ∑ a : C, z_iso (F a) (pr1 isoGe)
∃ a : C, z_iso (functor_composite F G a) e

  
C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
esF: essentially_surjective F
G: D ⟶ E
esG: essentially_surjective G
e: E
isoGe: ∑ a : D, z_iso (G a) e
isoFGe: ∑ a : C, z_iso (F a) (pr1 isoGe)
∑ a : C, z_iso (functor_composite F G a) e

  
C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
esF: essentially_surjective F
G: D ⟶ E
esG: essentially_surjective G
e: E
isoGe: ∑ a : D, z_iso (G a) e
isoFGe: ∑ a : C, z_iso (F a) (pr1 isoGe)
z_iso (G (F (pr1 isoFGe))) e

  
C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
esF: essentially_surjective F
G: D ⟶ E
esG: essentially_surjective G
e: E
isoGe: ∑ a : D, z_iso (G a) e
isoFGe: ∑ a : C, z_iso (F a) (pr1 isoGe)
z_iso (G (F (pr1 isoFGe))) (G (pr1 isoGe))
C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
esF: essentially_surjective F
G: D ⟶ E
esG: essentially_surjective G
e: E
isoGe: ∑ a : D, z_iso (G a) e
isoFGe: ∑ a : C, z_iso (F a) (pr1 isoGe)
z_iso (G (pr1 isoGe)) e

  
C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
esF: essentially_surjective F
G: D ⟶ E
esG: essentially_surjective G
e: E
isoGe: ∑ a : D, z_iso (G a) e
isoFGe: ∑ a : C, z_iso (F a) (pr1 isoGe)
z_iso (G (F (pr1 isoFGe))) (G (pr1 isoGe))
 
C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
esF: essentially_surjective F
G: D ⟶ E
esG: essentially_surjective G
e: E
isoGe: ∑ a : D, z_iso (G a) e
isoFGe: ∑ a : C, z_iso (F a) (pr1 isoGe)
z_iso (F (pr1 isoFGe)) (pr1 isoGe)

    exact (pr2 isoFGe).
  
C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
esF: essentially_surjective F
G: D ⟶ E
esG: essentially_surjective G
e: E
isoGe: ∑ a : D, z_iso (G a) e
isoFGe: ∑ a : C, z_iso (F a) (pr1 isoGe)
z_iso (G (pr1 isoGe)) e
 apply (pr2 isoGe).
Defined.

(** If the composition of two functors is essentially surjective,
  the second functor is essentially surjective as well. *)

C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
H: essentially_surjective (functor_composite F F')
essentially_surjective F'


C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
H: essentially_surjective (functor_composite F F')
essentially_surjective F'

  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
H: essentially_surjective (functor_composite F F')
b: C''
∃ a : C', z_iso (F' a) b

  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
H: essentially_surjective (functor_composite F F')
b: C''
(∑ a : C, z_iso (functor_composite F F' a) b)
→ ∑ a : C', z_iso (F' a) b

  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
H: essentially_surjective (functor_composite F F')
b: C''
x: ∑ a : C, z_iso (functor_composite F F' a) b
∑ a : C', z_iso (F' a) b

  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
H: essentially_surjective (functor_composite F F')
b: C''
x: ∑ a : C, z_iso (functor_composite F F' a) b
z_iso (F' (F (pr1 x))) b

  exact (pr2 x).
Qed.

(** ** Faithful functors *)

Definition faithful {C D : precategory_data} (F : functor C D) :=
  ∏ a b : ob C, isincl (fun f : a --> b => #F f).


C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
isaprop (faithful F)


C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
isaprop (faithful F)

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
isaprop (∏ a b : C, isincl (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f))

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
t, t0: C
isofhlevel 1 (isincl (λ f : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧, # F f))

  apply isapropisincl.
Qed.

(** Composition of faithful functors yields a faithful functor. *)


C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
faithF: faithful F
G: D ⟶ E
faithG: faithful G
faithful (functor_composite F G)


C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
faithF: faithful F
G: D ⟶ E
faithG: faithful G
faithful (functor_composite F G)

  
C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
faithF: ∏ a b : C, isincl (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f)
G: D ⟶ E
faithG: ∏ a b : D, isincl (λ f : D ⟦ a, b ⟧, # G f)
∏ a b : C,
isincl (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # (functor_composite F G) f)

  intros ? ?; apply (isinclcomp (_,, faithF _ _) (_,, faithG _ _)).
Qed.

(** If the composition of two functors is faithful, the first functor is faithful as well. *)

C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
H: faithful (functor_composite F F')
faithful F


C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
H: faithful (functor_composite F F')
faithful F

  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
H: faithful (functor_composite F F')
a, b: C
f: C' ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g, g': hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f) f
isofhlevel 0 (g = g')

  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
H: faithful (functor_composite F F')
a, b: C
f: C' ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g, g': hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f) f
i:= H a b (# F' f): isofhlevel 1
  (hfiber
     (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧,
      # (functor_composite F F') f) (# F' f))
isofhlevel 0 (g = g')

  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
H: faithful (functor_composite F F')
a, b: C
f: C' ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g, g': hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f) f
i:= H a b (# F' f): ∏
x
 x' : hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F' (# F f))
        (# F' f), iscontr (x = x')
isofhlevel 0 (g = g')

  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
H: faithful (functor_composite F F')
a, b: C
f: C' ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g, g': hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f) f
i:= H a b (# F' f): ∏
x
 x' : hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F' (# F f))
        (# F' f), iscontr (x = x')
g = g'
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
H: faithful (functor_composite F F')
a, b: C
f: C' ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g, g': hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f) f
i:= H a b (# F' f): ∏
x
 x' : hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F' (# F f))
        (# F' f), iscontr (x = x')
∏ t : g = g', t = ?x

  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
H: faithful (functor_composite F F')
a, b: C
f: C' ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g, g': hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f) f
i:= H a b (# F' f): ∏
x
 x' : hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F' (# F f))
        (# F' f), iscontr (x = x')
g = g'
 
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
H: faithful (functor_composite F F')
a, b: C
f: C' ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g, g': hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f) f
i:= H a b (# F' f): ∏
x
 x' : hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F' (# F f))
        (# F' f), iscontr (x = x')
isPredicate (λ x : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F x = f)
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
H: faithful (functor_composite F F')
a, b: C
f: C' ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g, g': hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f) f
i:= H a b (# F' f): ∏
x
 x' : hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F' (# F f))
        (# F' f), iscontr (x = x')
pr1 g = pr1 g'

    
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
H: faithful (functor_composite F F')
a, b: C
f: C' ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g, g': hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f) f
i:= H a b (# F' f): ∏
x
 x' : hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F' (# F f))
        (# F' f), iscontr (x = x')
isPredicate (λ x : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F x = f)

      
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
H: faithful (functor_composite F F')
a, b: C
f: C' ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g, g': hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f) f
i:= H a b (# F' f): ∏
x
 x' : hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F' (# F f))
        (# F' f), iscontr (x = x')
x: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
isaprop (# F x = f)

      apply homset_property.
    
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
H: faithful (functor_composite F F')
a, b: C
f: C' ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g, g': hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f) f
i:= H a b (# F' f): ∏
x
 x' : hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F' (# F f))
        (# F' f), iscontr (x = x')
pr1 g = pr1 g'

    exact (base_paths _ _ (pr1 (H _ _ _
      (make_hfiber _ (pr1 g) (maponpaths #F' (pr2 g)))
      (make_hfiber _ (pr1 g') (maponpaths #F' (pr2 g')))))).
  
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
H: faithful (functor_composite F F')
a, b: C
f: C' ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g, g': hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f) f
i:= H a b (# F' f): ∏
x
 x' : hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F' (# F f))
        (# F' f), iscontr (x = x')
∏ t : g = g',
t =
subtypePath
  ((λ x : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, C' (F a) (F b) (# F x) f)
   :
   isPredicate (λ x : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F x = f))
  (base_paths
     (make_hfiber
        (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧,
         # (functor_composite F F') f) (pr1 g)
        (maponpaths # F' (pr2 g)))
     (make_hfiber
        (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧,
         # (functor_composite F F') f) (pr1 g')
        (maponpaths # F' (pr2 g')))
     (pr1
        (H a b (# F' f)
           (make_hfiber
              (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧,
               # (functor_composite F F') f) (pr1 g)
              (maponpaths # F' (pr2 g)))
           (make_hfiber
              (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧,
               # (functor_composite F F') f) (pr1 g')
              (maponpaths # F' (pr2 g'))))))
 
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
H: faithful (functor_composite F F')
a, b: C
f: C' ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g, g': hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f) f
i:= H a b (# F' f): ∏
x
 x' : hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F' (# F f))
        (# F' f), iscontr (x = x')
t: g = g'
t =
subtypePath
  ((λ x : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, C' (F a) (F b) (# F x) f)
   :
   isPredicate (λ x : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F x = f))
  (base_paths
     (make_hfiber
        (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧,
         # (functor_composite F F') f) (pr1 g)
        (maponpaths # F' (pr2 g)))
     (make_hfiber
        (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧,
         # (functor_composite F F') f) (pr1 g')
        (maponpaths # F' (pr2 g')))
     (pr1
        (H a b (# F' f)
           (make_hfiber
              (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧,
               # (functor_composite F F') f) (pr1 g)
              (maponpaths # F' (pr2 g)))
           (make_hfiber
              (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧,
               # (functor_composite F F') f) (pr1 g')
              (maponpaths # F' (pr2 g'))))))

    
C, C', C'': category
F: C ⟶ C'
F': C' ⟶ C''
H: faithful (functor_composite F F')
a, b: C
f: C' ⟦ F a, F b ⟧
g, g': hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f) f
i:= H a b (# F' f): ∏
x
 x' : hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F' (# F f))
        (# F' f), iscontr (x = x')
t: g = g'
isaset (hfiber (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f) f)

    apply isaset_hfiber;
      apply homset_property.
Qed.

(** Faithful functors reflect commutative triangles. If F f · F g = F h,
    in D, then f · g = h in C. (Really, this is true more generally for any
    diagram.) *)


C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: faithful F
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
# F f · # F g = # F h → f · g = h


C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: faithful F
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
# F f · # F g = # F h → f · g = h

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: faithful F
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
feq: # F f · # F g = # F h
f · g = h

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: faithful F
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
feq: # F f · # F g = # F h
isInjective # F
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: faithful F
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
feq: # F f · # F g = # F h
# F (f · g) = # F h

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: faithful F
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
feq: # F f · # F g = # F h
isInjective # F
 apply isweqonpathsincl, FF.
  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: faithful F
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ a, c ⟧
feq: # F f · # F g = # F h
# F (f · g) = # F h
 exact (functor_comp F f g @ feq).
Defined.

(** a simpler instance of that principle *)

C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: faithful F
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
# F f = # F g → f = g


C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: faithful F
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
# F f = # F g → f = g

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: faithful F
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
feq: # F f = # F g
f = g

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: faithful F
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
feq: # F f = # F g
isInjective # F
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: faithful F
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
feq: # F f = # F g
# F f = # F g

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: faithful F
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
feq: # F f = # F g
isInjective # F
 apply isweqonpathsincl, FF.
  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
FF: faithful F
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
feq: # F f = # F g
# F f = # F g
 exact feq.
Defined.

(** ** Full functors *)

Definition full {C D : precategory_data} (F : functor C D) :=
   ∏ a b: C, issurjective (fun f : a --> b => #F f).


C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
isaprop (full F)


C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
isaprop (full F)

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
isaprop
  (∏ a b : C, issurjective (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f))

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
t, t0: C
isofhlevel 1 (issurjective (λ f : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧, # F f))

  apply isapropissurjective.
Qed.

(** Composition of full functors yields a full functor *)


C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fullF: full F
G: D ⟶ E
fullG: full G
full (functor_composite F G)


C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fullF: full F
G: D ⟶ E
fullG: full G
full (functor_composite F G)

  
C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fullF: ∏ a b : C,
issurjective (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f)
G: D ⟶ E
fullG: ∏ a b : D,
issurjective (λ f : D ⟦ a, b ⟧, # G f)
∏ a b : C,
issurjective
  (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # (functor_composite F G) f)

  intros ? ?; apply (issurjcomp _ _ (fullF _ _) (fullG _ _)).
Qed.

(** ** Fully faithful is the same as full and faithful *)

Definition full_and_faithful {C D : precategory_data} (F : functor C D) :=
   (full F) × (faithful F).


C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
fully_faithful F → full_and_faithful F


C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
fully_faithful F → full_and_faithful F

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
H: fully_faithful F
full_and_faithful F

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
H: fully_faithful F
full F
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
H: fully_faithful F
faithful F

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
H: fully_faithful F
∏ a b : C, issurjective (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f)
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
H: fully_faithful F
faithful F
 
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
H: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
issurjective (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f)
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
H: fully_faithful F
faithful F

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
H: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
isweq (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f)
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
H: fully_faithful F
faithful F

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
H: fully_faithful F
faithful F

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
H: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
isincl (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f)

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
H: fully_faithful F
a, b: C
isweq (λ f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, # F f)

  apply H.
Qed.



C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
full_and_faithful F → fully_faithful F


C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
full_and_faithful F → fully_faithful F

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
Hfull: full F
Hfaith: faithful F
fully_faithful F

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
Hfull: full F
Hfaith: faithful F
a, b: C
isweq # F

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
Hfull: full F
Hfaith: faithful F
a, b: C
isweq # F

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
Hfull: full F
Hfaith: faithful F
a, b: C
isincl # F
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
Hfull: full F
Hfaith: faithful F
a, b: C
issurjective # F

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
Hfull: full F
Hfaith: faithful F
a, b: C
isincl # F
 apply Hfaith.
  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
Hfull: full F
Hfaith: faithful F
a, b: C
issurjective # F
 apply Hfull.
Defined.


C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
isaprop (full_and_faithful F)


C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
isaprop (full_and_faithful F)

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
isaprop (full F)
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
isaprop (faithful F)

  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
isaprop (full F)
 apply isaprop_full.
  
C, D: precategory_data
F: C ⟶ D
isaprop (faithful F)
 apply isaprop_faithful.
Qed.


Definition weq_fully_faithful_full_and_faithful (C D : precategory_data) (F : functor C D) :
   (fully_faithful F) ≃ (full_and_faithful F) :=
  weqimplimpl (fully_faithful_implies_full_and_faithful _ _ F)
              (full_and_faithful_implies_fully_faithful _ _ F)
              (isaprop_fully_faithful _ _ F)
              (isaprop_full_and_faithful _ _ F).

(** Composition of fully faithful functors yields a fully faithful functor. *)


C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
f_and_f_F: full_and_faithful F
G: D ⟶ E
f_and_f_G: full_and_faithful G
full_and_faithful (functor_composite F G)


C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
f_and_f_F: full_and_faithful F
G: D ⟶ E
f_and_f_G: full_and_faithful G
full_and_faithful (functor_composite F G)

  
C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
f_and_f_F: full_and_faithful F
G: D ⟶ E
f_and_f_G: full_and_faithful G
full (functor_composite F G)
C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
f_and_f_F: full_and_faithful F
G: D ⟶ E
f_and_f_G: full_and_faithful G
faithful (functor_composite F G)

  
C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
f_and_f_F: full_and_faithful F
G: D ⟶ E
f_and_f_G: full_and_faithful G
full (functor_composite F G)
 apply comp_full_is_full; [apply (pr1 f_and_f_F)|apply (pr1 f_and_f_G)].
  
C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
f_and_f_F: full_and_faithful F
G: D ⟶ E
f_and_f_G: full_and_faithful G
faithful (functor_composite F G)
 apply comp_faithful_is_faithful; [apply (pr2 f_and_f_F)|apply (pr2 f_and_f_G)].
Qed.


C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
ffF: fully_faithful F
G: D ⟶ E
ffG: fully_faithful G
fully_faithful (functor_composite F G)


C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
ffF: fully_faithful F
G: D ⟶ E
ffG: fully_faithful G
fully_faithful (functor_composite F G)

  
C, D, E: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
ffF: ∏ a b : C, isweq # F
G: D ⟶ E
ffG: ∏ a b : D, isweq # G
∏ a b : C, isweq # (functor_composite F G)

  intros ? ?; apply (pr2 (weqcomp (_,, ffF _ _) (_,, ffG _ _))).
Qed.

(** Fully faithful functors induce equivalences on commutative triangles

    Compare to [faithful_reflects_commutative_triangle]. *)

C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fff: fully_faithful F
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
f · g = h ≃ # F f · # F g = # F h


C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fff: fully_faithful F
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
f · g = h ≃ # F f · # F g = # F h

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fff: fully_faithful F
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
f · g = h ≃ # F (f · g) = # F h
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fff: fully_faithful F
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
# F (f · g) = # F h ≃ # F f · # F g = # F h

  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fff: fully_faithful F
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
f · g = h ≃ # F (f · g) = # F h
 
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fff: fully_faithful F
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
isweq ?f

    apply (isweqmaponpaths (weq_from_fully_faithful fff _ _) (f · g) h).
  
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fff: fully_faithful F
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
# F (f · g) = # F h ≃ # F f · # F g = # F h
 
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fff: fully_faithful F
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
p: # F (f · g) = # F h
# F f · # F g = # F h
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fff: fully_faithful F
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
p: # F f · # F g = # F h
# F (f · g) = # F h
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fff: fully_faithful F
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
p: # F (f · g) = # F h
(λ p : # F f · # F g = # F h, ?Goal0)
  ((λ p : # F (f · g) = # F h, ?Goal) p) = p
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fff: fully_faithful F
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
p: # F f · # F g = # F h
(λ p : # F (f · g) = # F h, ?Goal)
  ((λ p : # F f · # F g = # F h, ?Goal0) p) = p

    
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fff: fully_faithful F
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
p: # F (f · g) = # F h
# F f · # F g = # F h
 
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fff: fully_faithful F
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
p: # F (f · g) = # F h
# F f · # F g = # F (f · g)

      apply (!functor_comp _ _ _).
    
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fff: fully_faithful F
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
p: # F f · # F g = # F h
# F (f · g) = # F h
 
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fff: fully_faithful F
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
p: # F f · # F g = # F h
# F (f · g) = # F f · # F g

      apply (functor_comp _ _ _).
    
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fff: fully_faithful F
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
p: # F (f · g) = # F h
(λ p : # F f · # F g = # F h, functor_comp F f g @ p)
  ((λ p : # F (f · g) = # F h,
    ! functor_comp F f g @ p) p) = p
 
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fff: fully_faithful F
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
p: # F (f · g) = # F h
(functor_comp F f g @ ! functor_comp F f g) @ p = p

      
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fff: fully_faithful F
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
p: # F (f · g) = # F h
idpath (# F (f · g)) @ p = p

      reflexivity.
    
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fff: fully_faithful F
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
p: # F f · # F g = # F h
(λ p : # F (f · g) = # F h, ! functor_comp F f g @ p)
  ((λ p : # F f · # F g = # F h,
    functor_comp F f g @ p) p) = p
 
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fff: fully_faithful F
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
p: # F f · # F g = # F h
! functor_comp F f g @ functor_comp F f g @ p = p

      
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fff: fully_faithful F
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
p: # F f · # F g = # F h
(! functor_comp F f g @ functor_comp F f g) @ p = p

      
C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
fff: fully_faithful F
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Z ⟧
p: # F f · # F g = # F h
idpath (# F f · # F g) @ p = p

      reflexivity.
Qed.

(** ** Image on objects of a functor  *)
(** is used later to define the full image subcategory of a category [D]
       defined by a functor [F : C -> D] *)

Definition is_in_img_functor {C D : precategory_data} (F : functor C D)
      (d : ob D) :=
  ishinh (
  total2 (λ c : ob C, z_iso (F c) d)).

Definition sub_img_functor {C D : precategory_data}(F : functor C D) :
    hsubtype (ob D) :=
       λ d : ob D, is_in_img_functor F d.

Section functor_equalities.


C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
functor_composite (functor_identity C) F = F


C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
functor_composite (functor_identity C) F = F

  
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
is: is_functor (Fob,, Fmor)
functor_composite (functor_identity C)
  ((Fob,, Fmor),, is) = (Fob,, Fmor),, is

  
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
functor_composite (functor_identity C)
  ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) =
(Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax

  apply idpath .
Defined.


C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
functor_composite F (functor_identity D) = F


C, D: precategory
F: C ⟶ D
functor_composite F (functor_identity D) = F

  
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
is: is_functor (Fob,, Fmor)
functor_composite ((Fob,, Fmor),, is)
  (functor_identity D) = (Fob,, Fmor),, is

  
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
is: is_functor (Fob,, Fmor)
is_functor_composite ((Fob,, Fmor),, is)
  (functor_identity D) = is

  
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
is_functor_composite ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax)
  (functor_identity D) = idax,, compax

  
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
(λ a : C,
 let e1 := functor_id ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) a
   in
 let e2 :=
   functor_id (functor_identity D)
     (((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) a) in
 maponpaths # (functor_identity D) e1 @ e2) = idax
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
(λ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp (functor_identity D)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) g) in
 maponpaths # (functor_identity D) e1 @ e2) = compax

  
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
(λ a : C,
 maponpaths (λ f : D ⟦ Fob a, Fob a ⟧, f)
   (functor_id ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) a) @
 functor_id (functor_identity D) (Fob a)) = idax
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
(λ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp (functor_identity D)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) g) in
 maponpaths # (functor_identity D) e1 @ e2) = compax
 
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
homotsec
  (λ a : C,
   maponpaths (λ f : D ⟦ Fob a, Fob a ⟧, f)
     (functor_id ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) a) @
   functor_id (functor_identity D) (Fob a)) idax
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
(λ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp (functor_identity D)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) g) in
 maponpaths # (functor_identity D) e1 @ e2) = compax
 
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
t: C
maponpaths (λ f : D ⟦ Fob t, Fob t ⟧, f)
  (functor_id ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) t) @
functor_id (functor_identity D) (Fob t) = idax t
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
(λ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp (functor_identity D)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) g) in
 maponpaths # (functor_identity D) e1 @ e2) = compax
 
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
t: C
maponpaths (λ f : D ⟦ Fob t, Fob t ⟧, f)
  (functor_id ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) t) @
functor_id
  (functor_identity_data D,, is_functor_identity D)
  (Fob t) = idax t
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
(λ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp (functor_identity D)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) g) in
 maponpaths # (functor_identity D) e1 @ e2) = compax
  
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
t: C
maponpaths (λ f : D ⟦ Fob t, Fob t ⟧, f)
  (pr1 (pr2 ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax)) t) @
pr1
  (pr2
     (functor_identity_data D,, is_functor_identity D))
  (Fob t) = idax t
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
(λ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp (functor_identity D)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) g) in
 maponpaths # (functor_identity D) e1 @ e2) = compax
 
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
t: C
maponpaths (λ f : D ⟦ Fob t, Fob t ⟧, f) (idax t) @
idpath (identity (Fob t)) = idax t
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
(λ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp (functor_identity D)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) g) in
 maponpaths # (functor_identity D) e1 @ e2) = compax

  
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
t: C
idax t @ idpath (identity (Fob t)) = idax t
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧

compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
(λ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f g in

     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) g) in
 maponpaths # (functor_identity D) e1 @ e2) = compax

  
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D

idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
t: C
idax t = idax t

Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧

compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
(λ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),

   functor_comp ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f g in

C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧

compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
(λ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f g in

   functor_comp (functor_identity D)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) g) in

C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
homotsec
  (λ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
   let e1 :=
     functor_comp ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f g
     in
   let e2 :=
     functor_comp (functor_identity D)
       (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f)
       (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) g) in
   maponpaths # (functor_identity D) e1 @ e2) compax
 
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
t: C
(λ (b c : C) (f : C ⟦ t, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp (functor_identity D)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) g) in
 maponpaths # (functor_identity D) e1 @ e2) = compax t
 
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
t: C
homotsec
  (λ (b c : C) (f : C ⟦ t, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
   let e1 :=
     functor_comp ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f g
     in
   let e2 :=
     functor_comp (functor_identity D)
       (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f)
       (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) g) in
   maponpaths # (functor_identity D) e1 @ e2)
  (compax t)
 
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
t, t0: C
(λ (c : C) (f : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧) (g : C ⟦ t0, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp (functor_identity D)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) g) in
 maponpaths # (functor_identity D) e1 @ e2) =
compax t t0
 
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
t, t0: C
homotsec
  (λ (c : C) (f : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧) (g : C ⟦ t0, c ⟧),
   let e1 :=
     functor_comp ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f g
     in
   let e2 :=
     functor_comp (functor_identity D)
       (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f)
       (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) g) in
   maponpaths # (functor_identity D) e1 @ e2)
  (compax t t0)
 
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
t, t0, t1: C
(λ (f : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧) (g : C ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp (functor_identity D)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) g) in
 maponpaths # (functor_identity D) e1 @ e2) =
compax t t0 t1

  
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
t, t0, t1: C
homotsec
  (λ (f : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧) (g : C ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧),
   let e1 :=
     functor_comp ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f g
     in
   let e2 :=
     functor_comp (functor_identity D)
       (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f)
       (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) g) in
   maponpaths # (functor_identity D) e1 @ e2)
  (compax t t0 t1)
 
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
t, t0, t1: C
f: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
(λ g : C ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧,
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp (functor_identity D)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) g) in
 maponpaths # (functor_identity D) e1 @ e2) =
compax t t0 t1 f
 
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
t, t0, t1: C
f: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
homotsec
  (λ g : C ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧,
   let e1 :=
     functor_comp ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f g
     in
   let e2 :=
     functor_comp (functor_identity D)
       (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f)
       (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) g) in
   maponpaths # (functor_identity D) e1 @ e2)
  (compax t t0 t1 f)
 
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
t, t0, t1: C
f: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
g: C ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
(let e1 :=
   functor_comp ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp (functor_identity D)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f)
     (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) g) in
 maponpaths # (functor_identity D) e1 @ e2) =
compax t t0 t1 f g
 
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
t, t0, t1: C
f: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
g: C ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
maponpaths
  # (functor_identity_data D,, is_functor_identity D)
  (functor_comp ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f g) @
functor_comp
  (functor_identity_data D,, is_functor_identity D)
  (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f)
  (# ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) g) =
compax t t0 t1 f g
 
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
t, t0, t1: C
f: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
g: C ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
maponpaths (λ f : D ⟦ Fob t, Fob t1 ⟧, f)
  (functor_comp ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax) f g) @
functor_comp
  (functor_identity_data D,, is_functor_identity D)
  (Fmor t t0 f) (Fmor t0 t1 g) = compax t t0 t1 f g

  
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
t, t0, t1: C
f: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
g: C ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
maponpaths (λ f : D ⟦ Fob t, Fob t1 ⟧, f)
  (pr2 (pr2 ((Fob,, Fmor),, idax,, compax)) t t0 t1 f
     g) @
pr2
  (pr2
     (functor_identity_data D,, is_functor_identity D))
  (Fob t) (Fob t0) (Fob t1) (Fmor t t0 f)
  (Fmor t0 t1 g) = compax t t0 t1 f g
 
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
t, t0, t1: C
f: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
g: C ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
maponpaths (λ f : D ⟦ Fob t, Fob t1 ⟧, f)
  (compax t t0 t1 f g) @
idpath (Fmor t t0 f · Fmor t0 t1 g) =
compax t t0 t1 f g

  
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
t, t0, t1: C
f: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
g: C ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
compax t t0 t1 f g @
idpath (Fmor t t0 f · Fmor t0 t1 g) =
compax t t0 t1 f g

  
C, D: precategory
Fob: C → D
Fmor: ∏ a b : C, C ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ Fob a, Fob b ⟧
idax: functor_idax (Fob,, Fmor)
compax: functor_compax (Fob,, Fmor)
t, t0, t1: C
f: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
g: C ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
compax t t0 t1 f g = compax t t0 t1 f g

  apply idpath.

Defined.


C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0: C0 ⟶ C1
F1: C1 ⟶ C2
F2: C2 ⟶ C3
functor_composite (functor_composite F0 F1) F2 =
functor_composite F0 (functor_composite F1 F2)


C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0: C0 ⟶ C1
F1: C1 ⟶ C2
F2: C2 ⟶ C3
functor_composite (functor_composite F0 F1) F2 =
functor_composite F0 (functor_composite F1 F2)

  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1: C1 ⟶ C2
F2: C2 ⟶ C3
functor_composite
  (functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) F1) F2 =
functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
  (functor_composite F1 F2)

  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2: C2 ⟶ C3
functor_composite
  (functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
     ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) F2 =
functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
  (functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) F2)

  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
functor_composite
  (functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
     ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) =
functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
  (functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
     ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
 
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
functor_composite
  (functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
     ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) =
functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
  (functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
     ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))

  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
functor_composite_data
  (functor_composite_data ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
     ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1),,
   is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
     ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2),,
is_functor_composite
  (functor_composite_data ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
     ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1),,
   is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
     ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) =
functor_composite_data ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
  (functor_composite_data ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
     ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2),,
   is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
     ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)),,
is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
  (functor_composite_data ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
     ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2),,
   is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
     ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
 
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
functor_composite_data
  (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
     (F1ob,, F1mor)) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
is_functor_composite
  (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
     (F1ob,, F1mor),,
   is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
     ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) =
functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
  (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
     (F2ob,, F2mor)),,
is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
  (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
     (F2ob,, F2mor),,
   is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
     ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))

  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
is_functor_composite
  (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
     (F1ob,, F1mor),,
   is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
     ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) =
is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
  (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
     (F2ob,, F2mor),,
   is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
     ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
 
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
is_functor_composite
  (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
     (F1ob,, F1mor),,
   is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
     ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) =
is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
  (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
     (F2ob,, F2mor),,
   is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
     ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))

  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
(λ a : C0,
 let e1 :=
   functor_id
     (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
        (F1ob,, F1mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) a in
 let e2 :=
   functor_id ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
     ((functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
         (F1ob,, F1mor),,
       is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
         ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) a) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(λ a : C0,
 let e1 := functor_id ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) a in
 let e2 :=
   functor_id
     (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
        (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
     (((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) a) in
 maponpaths
   # (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
        (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F0ob,, F0mor) (F1ob,, F1mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
 maponpaths
   # (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)

  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
homotsec
  (λ a : C0,
   let e1 :=
     functor_id
       (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
          (F1ob,, F1mor),,
        is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
          ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) a in
   let e2 :=
     functor_id ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
       ((functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) a) in
   maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2)
  (λ a : C0,
   let e1 := functor_id ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) a in
   let e2 :=
     functor_id
       (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
          (F2ob,, F2mor),,
        is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
          ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
       (((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) a) in
   maponpaths
     # (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
          (F2ob,, F2mor),,
        is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
          ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F0ob,, F0mor) (F1ob,, F1mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
 maponpaths
   # (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)

  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t: C0
(let e1 :=
   functor_id
     (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
        (F1ob,, F1mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) t in
 let e2 :=
   functor_id ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
     ((functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
         (F1ob,, F1mor),,
       is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
         ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) t) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(let e1 := functor_id ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) t in
 let e2 :=
   functor_id
     (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
        (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
     (((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) t) in
 maponpaths
   # (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
        (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F0ob,, F0mor) (F1ob,, F1mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
 maponpaths
   # (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)


  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t: C0
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t)))
  (functor_id
     (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
        (F1ob,, F1mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) t) @
functor_id ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) (F1ob (F0ob t)) =
maponpaths
  (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t ⟧,
   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t) f))
  (functor_id ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) t) @
functor_id
  (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
     (F2ob,, F2mor),,
   is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
     ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) (F0ob t)
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F0ob,, F0mor) (F1ob,, F1mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
 maponpaths
   # (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)

  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t: C0
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t)))
  (functor_id
     (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
        (F1ob,, F1mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) t) @
functor_id ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) (F1ob (F0ob t)) =
maponpaths
  (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t ⟧,
   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t) f))
  (functor_id ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) t) @
functor_id
  (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
     (F2ob,, F2mor),,
   is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
     ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) (F0ob t)
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,

F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F0ob,, F0mor) (F1ob,, F1mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
 maponpaths
   # (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)

F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,

F1ob: C1 → C2

  (functor_id
     (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
        (F1ob,, F1mor),,

        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) t) @
functor_id ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) (F1ob (F0ob t)) =

  (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t ⟧,
   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t) f))
  (functor_id ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) t) @

     (F2ob,, F2mor),,

F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧

is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F0ob,, F0mor) (F1ob,, F1mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g in

   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
 maponpaths
   # (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)
 
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t: C0
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t)))
  (pr1
     (pr2
        (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1))) t) @
pr1 (pr2 ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) (F1ob (F0ob t)) =
maponpaths
  (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t ⟧,
   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t) f))
  (pr1 (pr2 ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)) t) @
pr1
  (pr2
     (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
        (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))) (F0ob t)

F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧

is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F0ob,, F0mor) (F1ob,, F1mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,

        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
 maponpaths
   # (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)
 
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t: C0
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t)))
  (maponpaths (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t))
     (functor_id ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) t) @
   functor_id ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) (F0ob t)) @
pr1 is2 (F1ob (F0ob t)) =
maponpaths
  (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t ⟧,
   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t) f)) (pr1 is0 t) @
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t)))
  (functor_id ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) (F0ob t)) @
functor_id ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) (F1ob (F0ob t))

F0ob: C0 → C1

 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data

     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g in

     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
 maponpaths
   # (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)

F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,

F1ob: C1 → C2

t: C0
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t)))
  (maponpaths (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t))
     (pr1 (pr2 ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)) t) @
   pr1 (pr2 ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) (F0ob t)) @
pr1 is2 (F1ob (F0ob t)) =
maponpaths
  (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t ⟧,
   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t) f)) (pr1 is0 t) @
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t)))
  (pr1 (pr2 ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) (F0ob t)) @
pr1 (pr2 ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) (F1ob (F0ob t))

 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp

     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g in

   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data

      is_functor_composite

        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
 maponpaths
   # (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,

F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t: C0
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t)))
  (maponpaths (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t)) (pr1 is0 t) @
   pr1 is1 (F0ob t)) @ pr1 is2 (F1ob (F0ob t)) =
maponpaths
  (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t ⟧,
   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t) f)) (pr1 is0 t) @
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t)))
  (pr1 is1 (F0ob t)) @ pr1 is2 (F1ob (F0ob t))

F0ob: C0 → C1

is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data

        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
 maponpaths
   # (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)

  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0id: functor_idax (F0ob,, F0mor)
is0comp: functor_compax (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t: C0
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t)))
  (maponpaths (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t))
     (pr1 (is0id,, is0comp) t) @ pr1 is1 (F0ob t)) @
pr1 is2 (F1ob (F0ob t)) =
maponpaths
  (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t ⟧,
   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t) f))
  (pr1 (is0id,, is0comp) t) @
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t)))
  (pr1 is1 (F0ob t)) @ pr1 is2 (F1ob (F0ob t))
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧

is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F0ob,, F0mor) (F1ob,, F1mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
 maponpaths
   # (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)

         is_functor_composite

           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)

F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,

is0comp: functor_compax (F0ob,, F0mor)

F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,

   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t) f)) (is0id t) @

 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),

   functor_comp

           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)

           (F1ob,, F1mor),,

F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0id: functor_idax (F0ob,, F0mor)
is0comp: functor_compax (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1id: functor_idax (F1ob,, F1mor)
is1comp: functor_compax (F1ob,, F1mor)

C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧

is2comp: functor_compax (F2ob,, F2mor)
t: C0
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t)))
  (maponpaths (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t)) (is0id t) @
   is1id (F0ob t)) @ is2id (F1ob (F0ob t)) =
(maponpaths
   (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t ⟧,
    F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t))
      (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t) f)) (is0id t) @

   (is1id (F0ob t))) @ is2id (F1ob (F0ob t))

F0ob: C0 → C1

is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data

           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
     (# (functor_composite_data

           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g in

F0ob: C0 → C1

     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t) f)) (is0id t) @

  (is1id (F0ob t))
