F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F0ob,, F0mor) (F1ob,, F1mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
 maponpaths
   # (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)

  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0id: functor_idax (F0ob,, F0mor)
is0comp: functor_compax (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1id: functor_idax (F1ob,, F1mor)
is1comp: functor_compax (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2id: functor_idax (F2ob,, F2mor)
is2comp: functor_compax (F2ob,, F2mor)
t: C0
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t)))
  (maponpaths (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t)) (is0id t)) @
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t)))
  (is1id (F0ob t)) =
maponpaths
  (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t ⟧,
   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t) f)) (is0id t) @
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t)))
  (is1id (F0ob t))
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F0ob,, F0mor) (F1ob,, F1mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
 maponpaths
   # (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)

  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0id: functor_idax (F0ob,, F0mor)
is0comp: functor_compax (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1id: functor_idax (F1ob,, F1mor)
is1comp: functor_compax (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2id: functor_idax (F2ob,, F2mor)
is2comp: functor_compax (F2ob,, F2mor)
t: C0
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t)))
  (maponpaths (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t)) (is0id t)) =
maponpaths
  (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t ⟧,
   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t) f)) (is0id t)
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F0ob,, F0mor) (F1ob,, F1mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
     (# (functor_composite_data 
           (F0ob,, F0mor) 
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite 
           ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
 (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
 maponpaths
   # (functor_composite_data 
        (F1ob,, F1mor) (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite 
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) 
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)

  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
        (F1ob,, F1mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
     (# (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
     (# (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
        (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
 maponpaths
   # (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
        (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)


  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
homotsec
  (λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
   let e1 :=
     functor_comp
       (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
          (F1ob,, F1mor),,
        is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
          ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
   let e2 :=
     functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
       (# (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
             (F1ob,, F1mor),,
           is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
             ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
       (# (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
             (F1ob,, F1mor),,
           is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
             ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
   maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2)
  (λ (a b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
   let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g
     in
   let e2 :=
     functor_comp
       (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
          (F2ob,, F2mor),,
        is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
          ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
       (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
       (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
   maponpaths
     # (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
          (F2ob,, F2mor),,
        is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
          ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)
 
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t: C0
(λ (b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ t, b ⟧) (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
        (F1ob,, F1mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
     (# (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
     (# (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(λ (b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ t, b ⟧) (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
 let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
        (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
 maponpaths
   # (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
        (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)
 
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t: C0
homotsec
  (λ (b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ t, b ⟧) (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
   let e1 :=
     functor_comp
       (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
          (F1ob,, F1mor),,
        is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
          ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
   let e2 :=
     functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
       (# (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
             (F1ob,, F1mor),,
           is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
             ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
       (# (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
             (F1ob,, F1mor),,
           is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
             ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
   maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2)
  (λ (b c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ t, b ⟧) (g : C0 ⟦ b, c ⟧),
   let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g
     in
   let e2 :=
     functor_comp
       (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
          (F2ob,, F2mor),,
        is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
          ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
       (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
       (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
   maponpaths
     # (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
          (F2ob,, F2mor),,
        is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
          ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)
 
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t, t0: C0
(λ (c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧) (g : C0 ⟦ t0, c ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
        (F1ob,, F1mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
     (# (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
     (# (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(λ (c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧) (g : C0 ⟦ t0, c ⟧),
 let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
        (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
 maponpaths
   # (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
        (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)
 
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t, t0: C0
homotsec
  (λ (c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧) (g : C0 ⟦ t0, c ⟧),
   let e1 :=
     functor_comp
       (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
          (F1ob,, F1mor),,
        is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
          ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
   let e2 :=
     functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
       (# (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
             (F1ob,, F1mor),,
           is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
             ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
       (# (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
             (F1ob,, F1mor),,
           is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
             ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
   maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2)
  (λ (c : C0) (f : C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧) (g : C0 ⟦ t0, c ⟧),
   let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g
     in
   let e2 :=
     functor_comp
       (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
          (F2ob,, F2mor),,
        is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
          ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
       (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
       (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
   maponpaths
     # (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
          (F2ob,, F2mor),,
        is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
          ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)
 
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t, t0, t1: C0
(λ (f : C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧) (g : C0 ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧),
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
        (F1ob,, F1mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
     (# (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
     (# (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(λ (f : C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧) (g : C0 ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧),
 let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
        (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
 maponpaths
   # (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
        (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)

  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t, t0, t1: C0
homotsec
  (λ (f : C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧) (g : C0 ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧),
   let e1 :=
     functor_comp
       (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
          (F1ob,, F1mor),,
        is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
          ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
   let e2 :=
     functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
       (# (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
             (F1ob,, F1mor),,
           is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
             ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
       (# (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
             (F1ob,, F1mor),,
           is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
             ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
   maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2)
  (λ (f : C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧) (g : C0 ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧),
   let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g
     in
   let e2 :=
     functor_comp
       (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
          (F2ob,, F2mor),,
        is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
          ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
       (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
       (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
   maponpaths
     # (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
          (F2ob,, F2mor),,
        is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
          ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)
 
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t, t0, t1: C0
f: C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
(λ g : C0 ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧,
 let e1 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
        (F1ob,, F1mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
     (# (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
     (# (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(λ g : C0 ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧,
 let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
        (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
 maponpaths
   # (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
        (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)
 
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t, t0, t1: C0
f: C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
homotsec
  (λ g : C0 ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧,
   let e1 :=
     functor_comp
       (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
          (F1ob,, F1mor),,
        is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
          ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
   let e2 :=
     functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
       (# (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
             (F1ob,, F1mor),,
           is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
             ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
       (# (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
             (F1ob,, F1mor),,
           is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
             ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
   maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2)
  (λ g : C0 ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧,
   let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g
     in
   let e2 :=
     functor_comp
       (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
          (F2ob,, F2mor),,
        is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
          ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
       (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
       (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
   maponpaths
     # (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
          (F2ob,, F2mor),,
        is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
          ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)
 
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t, t0, t1: C0
f: C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
g: C0 ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
(let e1 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
        (F1ob,, F1mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
     (# (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f)
     (# (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) g) in
 maponpaths # ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2) e1 @ e2) =
(let e1 := functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g in
 let e2 :=
   functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
        (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f)
     (# ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) g) in
 maponpaths
   # (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
        (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) e1 @ e2)


  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t, t0, t1: C0
f: C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
g: C0 ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (functor_comp
     (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
        (F1ob,, F1mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
        ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) f g) @
functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
  (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0mor t t0 f))
  (F1mor (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t0 t1 g)) =
maponpaths
  (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t1 ⟧,
   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1) f))
  (functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g) @
functor_comp
  (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
     (F2ob,, F2mor),,
   is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
     ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) (F0mor t t0 f)
  (F0mor t0 t1 g)

  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t, t0, t1: C0
f: C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
g: C0 ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (pr2
     (pr2
        (functor_composite_data (F0ob,, F0mor)
           (F1ob,, F1mor),,
         is_functor_composite ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)
           ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1))) t t0 t1 f g) @
pr2 (pr2 ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) (F1ob (F0ob t))
  (F1ob (F0ob t0)) (F1ob (F0ob t1))
  (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0mor t t0 f))
  (F1mor (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t0 t1 g)) =
maponpaths
  (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t1 ⟧,
   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1) f))
  (pr2 (pr2 ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)) t t0 t1 f g) @
pr2
  (pr2
     (functor_composite_data (F1ob,, F1mor)
        (F2ob,, F2mor),,
      is_functor_composite ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)
        ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2))) (F0ob t) (F0ob t0)
  (F0ob t1) (F0mor t t0 f) (F0mor t0 t1 g)
 
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t, t0, t1: C0
f: C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
g: C0 ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (maponpaths (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1))
     (functor_comp ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0) f g) @
   functor_comp ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) (F0mor t t0 f)
     (F0mor t0 t1 g)) @
pr2 is2 (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t0))
  (F1ob (F0ob t1))
  (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0mor t t0 f))
  (F1mor (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t0 t1 g)) =
maponpaths
  (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t1 ⟧,
   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1) f))
  (pr2 is0 t t0 t1 f g) @
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (functor_comp ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1) (F0mor t t0 f)
     (F0mor t0 t1 g)) @
functor_comp ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)
  (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0mor t t0 f))
  (F1mor (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t0 t1 g))
 
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t, t0, t1: C0
f: C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
g: C0 ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (maponpaths (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1))
     (pr2 (pr2 ((F0ob,, F0mor),, is0)) t t0 t1 f g) @
   pr2 (pr2 ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) (F0ob t) (F0ob t0)
     (F0ob t1) (F0mor t t0 f) (F0mor t0 t1 g)) @
pr2 is2 (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t0))
  (F1ob (F0ob t1))
  (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0mor t t0 f))
  (F1mor (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t0 t1 g)) =
maponpaths
  (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t1 ⟧,
   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1) f))
  (pr2 is0 t t0 t1 f g) @
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (pr2 (pr2 ((F1ob,, F1mor),, is1)) (F0ob t) (F0ob t0)
     (F0ob t1) (F0mor t t0 f) (F0mor t0 t1 g)) @
pr2 (pr2 ((F2ob,, F2mor),, is2)) (F1ob (F0ob t))
  (F1ob (F0ob t0)) (F1ob (F0ob t1))
  (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0mor t t0 f))
  (F1mor (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t0 t1 g))
  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0: is_functor (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t, t0, t1: C0
f: C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
g: C0 ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (maponpaths (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1))
     (pr2 is0 t t0 t1 f g) @
   pr2 is1 (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t t0 f)
     (F0mor t0 t1 g)) @
pr2 is2 (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t0))
  (F1ob (F0ob t1))
  (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0mor t t0 f))
  (F1mor (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t0 t1 g)) =
maponpaths
  (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t1 ⟧,
   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1) f))
  (pr2 is0 t t0 t1 f g) @
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (pr2 is1 (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t t0 f)
     (F0mor t0 t1 g)) @
pr2 is2 (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t0))
  (F1ob (F0ob t1))
  (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0mor t t0 f))
  (F1mor (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t0 t1 g))

  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0id: functor_idax (F0ob,, F0mor)
is0comp: functor_compax (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1: is_functor (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t, t0, t1: C0
f: C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
g: C0 ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (maponpaths (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1))
     (pr2 (is0id,, is0comp) t t0 t1 f g) @
   pr2 is1 (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t t0 f)
     (F0mor t0 t1 g)) @
pr2 is2 (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t0))
  (F1ob (F0ob t1))
  (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0mor t t0 f))
  (F1mor (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t0 t1 g)) =
maponpaths
  (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t1 ⟧,
   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1) f))
  (pr2 (is0id,, is0comp) t t0 t1 f g) @
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (pr2 is1 (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t t0 f)
     (F0mor t0 t1 g)) @
pr2 is2 (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t0))
  (F1ob (F0ob t1))
  (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0mor t t0 f))
  (F1mor (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t0 t1 g))

  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0id: functor_idax (F0ob,, F0mor)
is0comp: functor_compax (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1id: functor_idax (F1ob,, F1mor)
is1comp: functor_compax (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2: is_functor (F2ob,, F2mor)
t, t0, t1: C0
f: C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
g: C0 ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (maponpaths (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1))
     (pr2 (is0id,, is0comp) t t0 t1 f g) @
   pr2 (is1id,, is1comp) (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1)
     (F0mor t t0 f) (F0mor t0 t1 g)) @
pr2 is2 (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t0))
  (F1ob (F0ob t1))
  (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0mor t t0 f))
  (F1mor (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t0 t1 g)) =
maponpaths
  (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t1 ⟧,
   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1) f))
  (pr2 (is0id,, is0comp) t t0 t1 f g) @
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (pr2 (is1id,, is1comp) (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1)
     (F0mor t t0 f) (F0mor t0 t1 g)) @
pr2 is2 (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t0))
  (F1ob (F0ob t1))
  (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0mor t t0 f))
  (F1mor (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t0 t1 g))

  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0id: functor_idax (F0ob,, F0mor)
is0comp: functor_compax (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1id: functor_idax (F1ob,, F1mor)
is1comp: functor_compax (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2id: functor_idax (F2ob,, F2mor)
is2comp: functor_compax (F2ob,, F2mor)
t, t0, t1: C0
f: C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
g: C0 ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (maponpaths (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1))
     (pr2 (is0id,, is0comp) t t0 t1 f g) @
   pr2 (is1id,, is1comp) (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1)
     (F0mor t t0 f) (F0mor t0 t1 g)) @
pr2 (is2id,, is2comp) (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t0))
  (F1ob (F0ob t1))
  (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0mor t t0 f))
  (F1mor (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t0 t1 g)) =
maponpaths
  (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t1 ⟧,
   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1) f))
  (pr2 (is0id,, is0comp) t t0 t1 f g) @
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (pr2 (is1id,, is1comp) (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1)
     (F0mor t t0 f) (F0mor t0 t1 g)) @
pr2 (is2id,, is2comp) (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t0))
  (F1ob (F0ob t1))
  (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0mor t t0 f))
  (F1mor (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t0 t1 g))

  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0id: functor_idax (F0ob,, F0mor)
is0comp: functor_compax (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1id: functor_idax (F1ob,, F1mor)
is1comp: functor_compax (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2id: functor_idax (F2ob,, F2mor)
is2comp: functor_compax (F2ob,, F2mor)
t, t0, t1: C0
f: C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
g: C0 ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (maponpaths (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1))
     (is0comp t t0 t1 f g) @
   is1comp (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t t0 f)
     (F0mor t0 t1 g)) @
is2comp (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t0))
  (F1ob (F0ob t1))
  (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0mor t t0 f))
  (F1mor (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t0 t1 g)) =
maponpaths
  (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t1 ⟧,
   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1) f))
  (is0comp t t0 t1 f g) @
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (is1comp (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t t0 f)
     (F0mor t0 t1 g)) @
is2comp (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t0))
  (F1ob (F0ob t1))
  (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0mor t t0 f))
  (F1mor (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t0 t1 g))


  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0id: functor_idax (F0ob,, F0mor)
is0comp: functor_compax (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1id: functor_idax (F1ob,, F1mor)
is1comp: functor_compax (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2id: functor_idax (F2ob,, F2mor)
is2comp: functor_compax (F2ob,, F2mor)
t, t0, t1: C0
f: C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
g: C0 ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (maponpaths (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1))
     (is0comp t t0 t1 f g) @
   is1comp (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t t0 f)
     (F0mor t0 t1 g)) @
is2comp (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t0))
  (F1ob (F0ob t1))
  (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0mor t t0 f))
  (F1mor (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t0 t1 g)) =
(maponpaths
   (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t1 ⟧,
    F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1))
      (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1) f))
   (is0comp t t0 t1 f g) @
 maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
   (is1comp (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1)
      (F0mor t t0 f) (F0mor t0 t1 g))) @
is2comp (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t0))
  (F1ob (F0ob t1))
  (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0mor t t0 f))
  (F1mor (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t0 t1 g))

  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0id: functor_idax (F0ob,, F0mor)
is0comp: functor_compax (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1id: functor_idax (F1ob,, F1mor)
is1comp: functor_compax (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2id: functor_idax (F2ob,, F2mor)
is2comp: functor_compax (F2ob,, F2mor)
t, t0, t1: C0
f: C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
g: C0 ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (maponpaths (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1))
     (is0comp t t0 t1 f g) @
   is1comp (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t t0 f)
     (F0mor t0 t1 g)) =
maponpaths
  (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t1 ⟧,
   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1) f))
  (is0comp t t0 t1 f g) @
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (is1comp (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t t0 f)
     (F0mor t0 t1 g))

  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0id: functor_idax (F0ob,, F0mor)
is0comp: functor_compax (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1id: functor_idax (F1ob,, F1mor)
is1comp: functor_compax (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2id: functor_idax (F2ob,, F2mor)
is2comp: functor_compax (F2ob,, F2mor)
t, t0, t1: C0
f: C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
g: C0 ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (maponpaths (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1))
     (is0comp t t0 t1 f g)) @
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (is1comp (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t t0 f)
     (F0mor t0 t1 g)) =
maponpaths
  (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t1 ⟧,
   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1) f))
  (is0comp t t0 t1 f g) @
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (is1comp (F0ob t) (F0ob t0) (F0ob t1) (F0mor t t0 f)
     (F0mor t0 t1 g))

  
C0, C1, C2, C3: precategory
F0ob: C0 → C1
F0mor: ∏ a b : C0,
C0 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C1 ⟦ F0ob a, F0ob b ⟧
is0id: functor_idax (F0ob,, F0mor)
is0comp: functor_compax (F0ob,, F0mor)
F1ob: C1 → C2
F1mor: ∏ a b : C1,
C1 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C2 ⟦ F1ob a, F1ob b ⟧
is1id: functor_idax (F1ob,, F1mor)
is1comp: functor_compax (F1ob,, F1mor)
F2ob: C2 → C3
F2mor: ∏ a b : C2,
C2 ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C3 ⟦ F2ob a, F2ob b ⟧
is2id: functor_idax (F2ob,, F2mor)
is2comp: functor_compax (F2ob,, F2mor)
t, t0, t1: C0
f: C0 ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
g: C0 ⟦ t0, t1 ⟧
maponpaths (F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1)))
  (maponpaths (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1))
     (is0comp t t0 t1 f g)) =
maponpaths
  (λ f : C1 ⟦ F0ob t, F0ob t1 ⟧,
   F2mor (F1ob (F0ob t)) (F1ob (F0ob t1))
     (F1mor (F0ob t) (F0ob t1) f))
  (is0comp t t0 t1 f g)

  apply maponpathscomp .
Defined.

End functor_equalities.


(**
 Pseudomonic functors
 *)
Definition full_on_iso
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y : C₁),
     issurjective (λ (f : z_iso x y), functor_on_z_iso F f).

Definition pseudomonic
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           (F : C₁ ⟶ C₂)
  : UU
  := faithful F × full_on_iso F.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: pseudomonic F
x, y: C₁
isweq (functor_on_z_iso F)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: pseudomonic F
x, y: C₁
isweq (functor_on_z_iso F)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: pseudomonic F
x, y: C₁
g: z_iso (F x) (F y)
iscontr (hfiber (functor_on_z_iso F) g)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: pseudomonic F
x, y: C₁
g: z_iso (F x) (F y)
isaprop (iscontr (hfiber (functor_on_z_iso F) g))
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: pseudomonic F
x, y: C₁
g: z_iso (F x) (F y)
hfiber (λ f : z_iso x y, functor_on_z_iso F f) g
→ iscontr (hfiber (functor_on_z_iso F) g)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: pseudomonic F
x, y: C₁
g: z_iso (F x) (F y)
isaprop (iscontr (hfiber (functor_on_z_iso F) g))

    apply isapropiscontr.
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: pseudomonic F
x, y: C₁
g: z_iso (F x) (F y)
hfiber (λ f : z_iso x y, functor_on_z_iso F f) g
→ iscontr (hfiber (functor_on_z_iso F) g)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: pseudomonic F
x, y: C₁
g: z_iso (F x) (F y)
inv: hfiber (λ f : z_iso x y, functor_on_z_iso F f) g
iscontr (hfiber (functor_on_z_iso F) g)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: pseudomonic F
x, y: C₁
g: z_iso (F x) (F y)
inv: hfiber (λ f : z_iso x y, functor_on_z_iso F f) g
isaprop (hfiber (functor_on_z_iso F) g)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: pseudomonic F
x, y: C₁
g: z_iso (F x) (F y)
inv: hfiber (λ f : z_iso x y, functor_on_z_iso F f) g
hfiber (functor_on_z_iso F) g

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: pseudomonic F
x, y: C₁
g: z_iso (F x) (F y)
inv: hfiber (λ f : z_iso x y, functor_on_z_iso F f) g
isaprop (hfiber (functor_on_z_iso F) g)
 abstract
      (use invproofirrelevance ;
       intros φ₁ φ₂ ;
       use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaset_z_iso ; apply homset_property | ] ;
       use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_is_z_isomorphism | ] ;
       use (maponpaths pr1 (proofirrelevance _ (pr1 HF x y g) (_ ,, _) (_ ,, _))) ;
       [ exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₁)) | exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 φ₂)) ]).
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
HF: pseudomonic F
x, y: C₁
g: z_iso (F x) (F y)
inv: hfiber (λ f : z_iso x y, functor_on_z_iso F f) g
hfiber (functor_on_z_iso F) g
 exact inv.
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (pseudomonic F)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (pseudomonic F)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (faithful F)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (full_on_iso F)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (faithful F)
 apply isaprop_faithful.
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
isaprop (full_on_iso F)
 
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
t, t0: C₁
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t0 : C₁,
    issurjective
      (λ f : z_iso t t0, functor_on_z_iso F f)) t0)

    apply isapropissurjective.
Qed.

(** More on equality of functors *)

C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
x: C₁
F x = G x


C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
x: C₁
F x = G x

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
F x = F x

  apply idpath.
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F f · idtoiso (path_functor_ob p y) =
idtoiso (path_functor_ob p x) · # G f


C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F f · idtoiso (path_functor_ob p y) =
idtoiso (path_functor_ob p x) · # G f

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F f · identity (F y) = identity (F x) · # F f

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F f = # F f

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso (! path_functor_ob p x) · # F f
· idtoiso (path_functor_ob p y) = # G f


C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso (! path_functor_ob p x) · # F f
· idtoiso (path_functor_ob p y) = # G f

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (F x) · # F f · identity (F y) = # F f

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F f = # F f

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F f =
idtoiso (path_functor_ob p x) · # G f
· idtoiso (! path_functor_ob p y)


C₁, C₂: category
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
p: F = G
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F f =
idtoiso (path_functor_ob p x) · # G f
· idtoiso (! path_functor_ob p y)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# F f =
idtoiso (path_functor_ob (idpath F) x) · # F f
· idtoiso (! path_functor_ob (idpath F) y)

  exact (!path_functor_mor_left (idpath _) _).
Qed.


C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
q: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
# F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
F = F'


C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
q: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
# F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
F = F'

  
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
q: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
# F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
homotsec F F'
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
q: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
# F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
∏ (C1 C2 : C) (f : C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (?H C1) (?H C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f

  
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
q: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
# F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
homotsec F F'
 exact p.
  
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
q: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
# F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
∏ (C1 C2 : C) (f : C ⟦ C1, C2 ⟧),
double_transport (p C1) (p C2) (pr2 F C1 C2 f) =
pr2 F' C1 C2 f
 
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
q: ∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
# F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
double_transport (p x) (p y) (pr2 F x y f) =
pr2 F' x y f

    
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q: # F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
double_transport (p x) (p y) (pr2 F x y f) =
pr2 F' x y f

    
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q: # F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
transportf (λ c : C', C' ⟦ F' x, c ⟧) (p y)
  (transportf (λ c : C', C' ⟦ c, F y ⟧) (p x)
     (pr2 F x y f)) = pr2 F' x y f

    
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q: # F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
transportf (λ c : C', C' ⟦ c, F y ⟧) (p x)
  (pr2 F x y f) · idtoiso (p y) = pr2 F' x y f

    
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q: # F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
idtoiso (! p x) · pr2 F x y f · idtoiso (p y) =
pr2 F' x y f

    
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q: # F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
idtoiso (! p x) · (pr2 F x y f · idtoiso (p y)) =
pr2 F' x y f

    
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q: # F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
idtoiso (! p x) · (pr2 F x y f · idtoiso (p y)) = ?b
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q: # F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
?b = pr2 F' x y f

    
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q: # F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
idtoiso (! p x) · (pr2 F x y f · idtoiso (p y)) = ?b

      
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q: # F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
pr2 F x y f · idtoiso (p y) = ?t2

      exact q.
    
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q: # F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
idtoiso (! p x) · (idtoiso (p x) · # F' f) =
pr2 F' x y f

    
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q: # F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
idtoiso (! p x) · idtoiso (p x) · # F' f =
pr2 F' x y f

    
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q: # F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
idtoiso (! p x) · idtoiso (p x) · # F' f = ?b
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q: # F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
?b = pr2 F' x y f

    
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q: # F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
idtoiso (! p x) · idtoiso (p x) · # F' f = ?b

      
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q: # F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
idtoiso (! p x) · idtoiso (p x) = ?y'

      
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q: # F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
?y' = idtoiso (! p x) · idtoiso (p x)

      apply pr1_idtoiso_concat.
    
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q: # F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
pr1 (idtoiso (! p x @ p x)) · # F' f = pr2 F' x y f

    
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q: # F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
pr1 (idtoiso (idpath (F' x))) · # F' f = pr2 F' x y f

    
C, C': category
F, F': functor_data C C'
p: homotsec F F'
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q: # F f · idtoiso (p y) = idtoiso (p x) · # F' f
identity (F' x) · # F' f = pr2 F' x y f

    apply id_left.
Qed.


Notation "F ∙ G" := (functor_composite F G) : cat.
(* to input: type "\." with Agda input method *)
(* the old notation had the arguments in the opposite order *)

(* Notation "G □ F" := (functor_composite F G) (at level 35, only parsing) : cat. *)
(* to input: type "\Box" or "\square" or "\sqw" or "\sq" with Agda input method *)
